tEn: Visual Genome: Connecting Language and Vision Using Crowdsourced Dense Image Annotations
tZh: Visual Genome：利用众包密集图像标注连接语言与视觉
sEn: We present Visual Genome, a dataset with over 100K images densely annotated with objects, attributes, and relationships to enable cognitive tasks like image description and question answering.
sZh: 我们提出了Visual Genome数据集，包含超过10万张图像，每张图像平均有21个物体、18个属性和18个物体间关系，旨在支持图像描述和问答等认知任务。
absEn: Despite progress in perceptual tasks such as image classification, computers still perform poorly on cognitive tasks such as image description and question answering. Cognition is core to tasks that involve not just recognizing, but reasoning about our visual world. However, models used to tackle the rich content in images for cognitive tasks are still being trained using the same datasets designed for perceptual tasks. To achieve success at cognitive tasks, models need to understand the interactions and relationships between objects in an image. When asked "What vehicle is the person riding?", computers will need to identify the objects in an image as well as the relationships riding(man, carriage) and pulling(horse, carriage) in order to answer correctly that "the person is riding a horse-drawn carriage". In this paper, we present the Visual Genome dataset to enable the modeling of such relationships. We collect dense annotations of objects, attributes, and relationships within each image to learn these models. Specifically, our dataset contains over 100K images where each image has an average of 21 objects, 18 attributes, and 18 pairwise relationships between objects. We canonicalize the objects, attributes, relationships, and noun phrases in region descriptions and questions answer pairs to WordNet synsets. Together, these annotations represent the densest and largest dataset of image descriptions, objects, attributes, relationships, and question answers.
absZh: 尽管在图像分类等感知任务上取得了进展，计算机在图像描述和问答等认知任务上仍然表现不佳。认知任务的核心不仅是识别，还包括对视觉世界的推理。然而，用于处理图像丰富内容以完成认知任务的模型，仍然在使用为感知任务设计的数据集进行训练。为了在认知任务上取得成功，模型需要理解图像中物体之间的交互和关系。当被问及“这个人骑的是什么交通工具？”时，计算机需要识别图像中的物体以及关系“骑（人，马车）”和“拉（马，马车）”，才能正确回答“这个人骑的是一辆马车”。在本文中，我们提出了Visual Genome数据集，以支持此类关系的建模。我们收集了每张图像中物体、属性和关系的密集标注，以学习这些模型。具体来说，我们的数据集包含超过10万张图像，每张图像平均有21个物体、18个属性和18个物体间的成对关系。我们将区域描述和问答对中的物体、属性、关系和名词短语规范化到WordNet同义词集。这些标注共同构成了图像描述、物体、属性、关系和问答方面最密集、最大的数据集。

contrib.en: Introduces Visual Genome, a dataset with 108K images, each annotated with 21 objects, 18 attributes, and 18 relationships on average.
contrib.zh: 提出Visual Genome数据集，包含10.8万张图像，每张图像平均标注21个物体、18个属性和18个关系。

contrib.en: Provides dense region descriptions (42 per image) and 1.7M question-answer pairs, enabling cognitive tasks like reasoning.
contrib.zh: 提供密集的区域描述（每张图像42条）和170万个问答对，支持推理等认知任务。

contrib.en: Canonicalizes objects, attributes, and relationships to WordNet synsets, enabling consistent cross-image querying.
contrib.zh: 将物体、属性和关系规范化到WordNet同义词集，实现跨图像的一致查询。

contrib.en: Constructs scene graphs that formally represent images, combining objects, attributes, and relationships into a structured graph.
contrib.zh: 构建场景图，将物体、属性和关系组合成结构化图，形式化表示图像。

contrib.en: Collects data via crowdsourcing with diversity enforcement using BLEU scores and verification via majority voting.
contrib.zh: 通过众包收集数据，使用BLEU分数确保多样性，并通过多数投票进行验证。

contrib.en: Achieves higher object density and semantic diversity than existing datasets like MS-COCO and ImageNet.
contrib.zh: 相比MS-COCO和ImageNet等现有数据集，实现了更高的物体密度和语义多样性。

limits.en: Dataset is biased toward images of people and sports, limiting generalizability to other domains.
limits.zh: 数据集偏向人物和运动图像，限制了向其他领域的泛化能力。

limits.en: Crowdsourced annotations may contain errors despite verification, affecting reliability.
limits.zh: 尽管经过验证，众包标注仍可能包含错误，影响可靠性。

limits.en: WordNet canonicalization may introduce ambiguity for polysemous words, requiring manual rules.
limits.zh: WordNet规范化可能对多义词引入歧义，需要手动规则修正。

limits.en: Scene graph construction relies on heuristic overlap thresholds, potentially merging distinct objects.
limits.zh: 场景图构建依赖启发式重叠阈值，可能合并不同物体。

limits.en: Region descriptions and QAs are limited to English, restricting multilingual applicability.
limits.zh: 区域描述和问答仅限于英语，限制了多语言适用性。

items.en: Despite progress in perceptual tasks such as image classification, computers still perform poorly on cognitive tasks such as image description and question answering. Cognition is core to tasks that involve not just recognizing, but reasoning about our visual world. However, models used to tackle the rich content in images for cognitive tasks are still being trained using the same datasets designed for perceptual tasks. To achieve success at cognitive tasks, models need to understand the interactions and relationships between objects in an image. When asked “What vehicle is the person riding?”, computers will need to identify the objects in an image as well as the relationships riding(man, carriage) and pulling(horse, carriage) in order to answer correctly that “the person is riding a horse-drawn carriage.”
items.zh: 尽管在图像分类等感知任务上取得了进展，计算机在图像描述和问答等认知任务上仍然表现不佳。认知是涉及不仅识别而且推理视觉世界的任务的核心。然而，用于处理认知任务中图像丰富内容的模型仍然在使用为感知任务设计的相同数据集进行训练。为了在认知任务上取得成功，模型需要理解图像中物体之间的交互和关系。当被问及“这个人骑的是什么交通工具？”时，计算机需要识别图像中的物体以及关系“骑(人, 马车)”和“拉(马, 马车)”，才能正确回答“这个人骑的是一辆马车。”

items.en: In this paper, we present the Visual Genome dataset to enable the modeling of such relationships. We collect dense annotations of objects, attributes, and relationships within each image to learn these models. Specifically, our dataset contains over 100100100K images where each image has an average of 212121 objects, 181818 attributes, and 181818 pairwise relationships between objects. We canonicalize the objects, attributes, relationships, and noun phrases in region descriptions and questions answer pairs to WordNet synsets. Together, these annotations represent the densest and largest dataset of image descriptions, objects, attributes, relationships, and question answers.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们提出了Visual Genome数据集，以实现对这种关系的建模。我们收集了每个图像中物体、属性和关系的密集标注，以学习这些模型。具体来说，我们的数据集包含超过100,100,100K张图像，每张图像平均有21个物体、18个属性和18对物体间的关系。我们将区域描述和问答对中的物体、属性、关系和名词短语规范化到WordNet同义词集。这些标注共同构成了图像描述、物体、属性、关系和问答的最密集和最大的数据集。

items.capEn: Figure 1: An overview of the data needed to move from perceptual awareness to cognitive understanding of images. We present a dataset of images densely annotated with numerous region descriptions, objects, attributes, and relationships. Region descriptions (e.g. “girl feeding large elephant” and “a man taking a picture behind girl”) are shown (top). The objects (e.g. elephant), attributes (e.g. large) and relationships (e.g. feeding) are shown (bottom). Our dataset also contains image related question answer pairs (not shown).
items.capZh: 图1：从感知意识到图像认知理解所需数据的概览。我们提出了一个数据集，其中图像密集标注了大量区域描述、物体、属性和关系。区域描述（例如“女孩喂大象”和“女孩后面拍照的男人”）显示在顶部。物体（例如大象）、属性（例如大）和关系（例如喂）显示在底部。我们的数据集还包含与图像相关的问答对（未显示）。

items.en: A holy grail of computer vision is the complete understanding of visual scenes: a model that is able to name and detect objects, describe their attributes, and recognize their relationships and interactions. Understanding scenes would enable important applications such as image search, question answering, and robotic interactions. Much progress has been made in recent years towards this goal, including image classification Deng et al., (2009); Perronnin et al., (2010); Simonyan and Zisserman, (2014); Krizhevsky et al., (2012); Szegedy et al., (2014) and object detection Everingham et al., (2010); Girshick et al., (2014); Sermanet et al., (2013); Girshick, (2015); Ren et al., 2015b . An important contributing factor is the availability of a large amount of data that drives the statistical models that underpin today’s advances in computational visual understanding. While the progress is exciting, we are still far from reaching the goal of comprehensive scene understanding. As Figure 1 shows, existing models would be able to detect discreet objects in a photo but would not be able to explain their interactions or the relationships between them. Such explanations tend to be cognitive in nature, integrating perceptual information into conclusions about the relationships between objects in a scene Bruner, (1990); Firestone and Scholl, (2015). A cognitive understanding of our visual world thus requires that we complement computers’ ability to detect objects with abilities to describe those objects Isola et al., (2015) and understand their interactions within a scene Sadeghi and Farhadi, (2011).
items.zh: 计算机视觉的一个圣杯是完整理解视觉场景：一个能够命名和检测物体、描述其属性、识别其关系和交互的模型。理解场景将支持重要应用，如图像搜索、问答和机器人交互。近年来，朝着这一目标取得了很大进展，包括图像分类Deng et al., (2009); Perronnin et al., (2010); Simonyan and Zisserman, (2014); Krizhevsky et al., (2012); Szegedy et al., (2014)和物体检测Everingham et al., (2010); Girshick et al., (2014); Sermanet et al., (2013); Girshick, (2015); Ren et al., 2015b。一个重要的促成因素是大量数据的可用性，这些数据驱动着当今计算视觉理解进步的统计模型。虽然进展令人兴奋，但我们距离全面场景理解的目标仍然很远。如图1所示，现有模型能够检测照片中的离散物体，但无法解释它们的交互或它们之间的关系。这种解释本质上是认知性的，将感知信息整合到关于场景中物体之间关系的结论中Bruner, (1990); Firestone and Scholl, (2015)。因此，对我们视觉世界的认知理解要求我们补充计算机检测物体的能力，使其能够描述这些物体Isola et al., (2015)并理解它们在场景中的交互Sadeghi and Farhadi, (2011)。

items.en: There is an increasing effort to put together the next generation of datasets to serve as training and benchmarking datasets for these deeper, cognitive scene understanding and reasoning tasks, the most notable being MS-COCO Lin et al., (2014) and VQA Antol et al., (2015). The MS-COCO dataset consists of 300300300K real-world photos collected from Flickr. For each image, there is pixel-level segmentation of 919191 object classes (when present) and 555 independent, user-generated sentences describing the scene. VQA adds to this a set of 614614614K question-answer pairs related to the visual contents of each image (see more details in Section 3.1). With this information, MS-COCO and VQA provide a fertile training and testing ground for models aimed at tasks for accurate object detection, segmentation, and summary-level image captioning Kiros et al., (2014); Mao et al., (2014); Karpathy and Fei-Fei, (2014); Vinyals et al., (2014) as well as basic QA Ren et al., 2015a ; Antol et al., (2015); Malinowski et al., (2015); Gao et al., (2015); Malinowski and Fritz, (2014). For example, a state-of-the-art model Karpathy and Fei-Fei, (2014) provides a description of one MS-COCO image in Figure 1 as “two men are standing next to an elephant.” But what is missing is the further understanding of where each object is, what each person is doing, what the relationship between the person and elephant is, etc. Without such relationships, these models fail to differentiate this image from other images of people next to elephants.
items.zh: 人们正在加大努力构建下一代数据集，作为这些更深层次的认知场景理解和推理任务的训练和基准数据集，其中最著名的是MS-COCO Lin et al., (2014)和VQA Antol et al., (2015)。MS-COCO数据集包含从Flickr收集的300,300,300K张真实世界照片。对于每张图像，有91个物体类别（如果存在）的像素级分割和5个独立的、用户生成的描述场景的句子。VQA在此基础上增加了每张图像相关的614,614,614K个问答对（详见第3.1节）。有了这些信息，MS-COCO和VQA为旨在准确物体检测、分割和摘要级图像描述Kiros et al., (2014); Mao et al., (2014); Karpathy and Fei-Fei, (2014); Vinyals et al., (2014)以及基本问答Ren et al., 2015a; Antol et al., (2015); Malinowski et al., (2015); Gao et al., (2015); Malinowski and Fritz, (2014)的模型提供了丰富的训练和测试场所。例如，一个最先进的模型Karpathy and Fei-Fei, (2014)将图1中的一张MS-COCO图像描述为“两个男人站在一头大象旁边”。但缺少的是对每个物体位置、每个人在做什么、人与大象之间关系等的进一步理解。没有这些关系，这些模型无法将该图像与其他人与大象相邻的图像区分开来。

items.en: To understand images thoroughly, we believe three key elements need to be added to existing datasets: a grounding of visual concepts to language Kiros et al., (2014), a more complete set of descriptions and QAs for each image based on multiple image regions Johnson et al., (2015), and a formalized representation of the components of an image Hayes, (1978). In the spirit of mapping out this complete information of the visual world, we introduce the Visual Genome dataset. The first release of the Visual Genome dataset uses 108,249108249108,249 images from the intersection of the YFCC100M Thomee et al., (2016) and MS-COCO Lin et al., (2014). Section 5 provides a more detailed description of the dataset. We highlight below the motivation and contributions of the three key elements that set Visual Genome apart from existing datasets.
items.zh: 为了彻底理解图像，我们认为需要在现有数据集中添加三个关键元素：视觉概念到语言的接地Kiros et al., (2014)、基于多个图像区域的更完整的描述和QA集Johnson et al., (2015)，以及图像组件的形式化表示Hayes, (1978)。本着描绘视觉世界完整信息的精神，我们引入了Visual Genome数据集。Visual Genome数据集的第一个版本使用了来自YFCC100M Thomee et al., (2016)和MS-COCO Lin et al., (2014)交集的108,249,108,249,108,249张图像。第5节提供了数据集的更详细描述。下面我们强调使Visual Genome区别于现有数据集的三个关键元素的动机和贡献。

items.en: The Visual Genome dataset regards relationships and attributes as first-class citizens of the annotation space, in addition to the traditional focus on objects. Recognition of relationships and attributes is an important part of the complete understanding of the visual scene, and in many cases, these elements are key to the story of a scene (e.g., the difference between “a dog chasing a man” versus “a man chasing a dog”). The Visual Genome dataset is among the first to provide a detailed labeling of object interactions and attributes, grounding visual concepts to language111The Lotus Hill Dataset Yao et al., (2007) also provides a similar annotation of object relationships, see Sec 3.1..
items.zh: Visual Genome数据集将关系和属性视为标注空间中的一等公民，此外还有传统的对物体的关注。关系和属性的识别是完整理解视觉场景的重要组成部分，在许多情况下，这些元素是场景故事的关键（例如，“狗追人”与“人追狗”的区别）。Visual Genome数据集是首批提供物体交互和属性详细标注的数据集之一，将视觉概念接地到语言。

items.en: An image is often a rich scenery that cannot be fully described in one summarizing sentence. The scene in Figure 1 contains multiple “stories”: “a man taking a photo of elephants,” “a woman feeding an elephant,” “a river in the background of lush grounds,” etc. Existing datasets such as Flickr 30K Young et al., (2014) and MS-COCO Lin et al., (2014) focus on high-level descriptions of an image222COCO has multiple sentences generated independently by different users, all focusing on providing an overall, one sentence description of the scene.. Instead, for each image in the Visual Genome dataset, we collect more than 42 descriptions for different regions in the image, providing a much denser and complete set of descriptions of the scene. In addition, inspired by VQA Antol et al., (2015), we also collect an average of 171717 question-answer pairs based on the descriptions for each image. Region-based question answers can be used to jointly develop NLP and vision models that can answer questions from either the description or the image, or both of them.
items.zh: 一张图像通常是一个丰富的场景，无法用一句总结性句子完全描述。图1中的场景包含多个“故事”：“一个男人在给大象拍照”、“一个女人在喂大象”、“郁郁葱葱的地面背景中的一条河”等。现有的数据集如Flickr 30K Young et al., (2014)和MS-COCO Lin et al., (2014)侧重于图像的高层描述。相反，对于Visual Genome数据集中的每张图像，我们收集了超过42个不同区域的描述，提供了更密集和完整的场景描述集。此外，受VQA Antol et al., (2015)的启发，我们还基于每张图像的描述收集了平均17个问答对。基于区域的问答可用于联合开发NLP和视觉模型，使其能够从描述或图像或两者中回答问题。

items.en: With a set of dense descriptions of an image and the explicit correspondences between visual pixels (i.e. bounding boxes of objects) and textual descriptors (i.e. relationships, attributes), the Visual Genome dataset is poised to be the first image dataset that is capable of providing a structured formalized representation of an image, in the form that is widely used in knowledge base representations in NLP Zhou et al., (2007); GuoDong et al., (2005); Culotta and Sorensen, (2004); Socher et al., (2012). For example, in Figure 1, we can formally express the relationship holding between the woman and food as holding(woman, food)). Putting together all the objects and relations in a scene, we can represent each image as a scene graph Johnson et al., (2015). The scene graph representation has been shown to improve semantic image retrieval Johnson et al., (2015); Schuster et al., (2015) and image captioning Farhadi et al., (2009); Chang et al., (2014); Gupta and Davis, (2008). Furthermore, all objects, attributes and relationships in each image in the Visual Genome dataset are canonicalized to its corresponding WordNet Miller, (1995) ID (called a synset ID). This mapping connects all images in Visual Genome and provides an effective way to consistently query the same concept (object, attribute, or relationship) in the dataset. It can also potentially help train models that can learn from contextual information from multiple images.
items.zh: 通过密集的图像描述集以及视觉像素（即物体的边界框）和文本描述符（即关系、属性）之间的显式对应，Visual Genome数据集有望成为第一个能够以结构化形式化表示图像的图像数据集，这种形式广泛用于NLP中的知识库表示Zhou et al., (2007); GuoDong et al., (2005); Culotta and Sorensen, (2004); Socher et al., (2012)。例如，在图1中，我们可以将女人和食物之间的关系形式化表示为holding(woman, food)。将场景中的所有物体和关系放在一起，我们可以将每张图像表示为一个场景图Johnson et al., (2015)。场景图表示已被证明可以改善语义图像检索Johnson et al., (2015); Schuster et al., (2015)和图像描述Farhadi et al., (2009); Chang et al., (2014); Gupta and Davis, (2008)。此外，Visual Genome数据集中每张图像的所有物体、属性和关系都被规范化到其对应的WordNet Miller, (1995) ID（称为同义词集ID）。这种映射连接了Visual Genome中的所有图像，并提供了一种有效的方式来一致地查询数据集中的相同概念（物体、属性或关系）。它还有可能帮助训练能够从多张图像的上下文信息中学习的模型。

items.en: In this paper, we introduce the Visual Genome dataset with the aim of training and benchmarking the next generation of computer models for comprehensive scene understanding. The paper proceeds as follows: In Section 2, we provide a detailed description of each component of the dataset. Section 3 provides a literature review of related datasets as well as related recognition tasks. Section 4 discusses the crowdsourcing strategies we deployed in the ongoing effort of collecting this dataset. Section 5 is a collection of data analysis statistics, showcasing the key properties of the Visual Genome dataset. Last but not least, Section 6 provides a set of experimental results that use Visual Genome as a benchmark.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了Visual Genome数据集，旨在训练和基准测试下一代用于全面场景理解的计算机模型。本文的结构如下：第2节详细描述了数据集的每个组成部分。第3节提供了相关数据集和相关识别任务的文献综述。第4节讨论了我们在收集该数据集的持续努力中部署的众包策略。第5节是数据分析统计的集合，展示了Visual Genome数据集的关键特性。最后但同样重要的是，第6节提供了一组使用Visual Genome作为基准的实验结果。

items.en: Further visualizations, API, and additional information on the Visual Genome dataset can be found online333https://visualgenome.org.
items.zh: 更多可视化、API和关于Visual Genome数据集的附加信息可以在线找到。

items.capEn: Figure 2: An example image from the Visual Genome dataset. We show 3 region descriptions and their corresponding region graphs. We also show the connected scene graph collected by combining all of the image’s region graphs. The top region description is “a man and a woman sit on a park bench along a river.” It contains the objects: man, woman, bench and river. The relationships that connect these objects are: sits_on(man, bench), in_front_of(man, river), and sits_on(woman, bench).
items.capZh: 图2：来自Visual Genome数据集的一个示例图像。我们展示了3个区域描述及其对应的区域图。我们还展示了通过组合图像的所有区域图收集的连接场景图。顶部的区域描述是“一个男人和一个女人坐在河边的公园长椅上”。它包含物体：男人、女人、长椅和河。连接这些物体的关系是：sits_on(man, bench)、in_front_of(man, river)和sits_on(woman, bench)。

items.capEn: Figure 3: An example image from our dataset along with its scene graph representation. The scene graph contains objects (child, instructor, helmet, etc.) that are localized in the image as bounding boxes (not shown). These objects also have attributes: large, green, behind, etc. Finally, objects are connected to each other through relationships: wears(child, helmet), wears(instructor, jacket), etc.
items.capZh: 图3：来自我们数据集的一个示例图像及其场景图表示。场景图包含物体（孩子、教练、头盔等），这些物体在图像中通过边界框（未显示）定位。这些物体还有属性：大、绿色、后面等。最后，物体通过关系相互连接：wears(child, helmet)、wears(instructor, jacket)等。

items.capEn: Figure 4: A representation of the Visual Genome dataset. Each image contains region descriptions that describe a localized portion of the image. We collect two types of question answer pairs (QAs): freeform QAs and region-based QAs. Each region is converted to a region graph representation of objects, attributes, and pairwise relationships. Finally, each of these region graphs are combined to form a scene graph with all the objects grounded to the image. Best viewed in color
items.capZh: 图4：Visual Genome数据集的表示。每张图像包含描述图像局部区域的区域描述。我们收集两种类型的问答对：自由形式问答和基于区域的问答。每个区域被转换为物体、属性和成对关系的区域图表示。最后，每个区域图被组合成一个场景图，所有物体都接地到图像。最佳彩色视图。

items.en: The Visual Genome dataset consists of seven main components: region descriptions, objects, attributes, relationships, region graphs, scene graphs, and question-answer pairs. Figure 4 shows examples of each component for one image. To enable research on comprehensive understanding of images, we begin by collecting descriptions and question answers. These are raw texts without any restrictions on length or vocabulary. Next, we extract objects, attributes and relationships from our descriptions. Together, objects, attributes and relationships fabricate our scene graphs that represent a formal representation of an image. In this section, we break down Figure 4 and explain each of the seven components. In Section 4, we will describe in more detail how data from each component is collected through a crowdsourcing platform.
items.zh: Visual Genome数据集由七个主要组成部分组成：区域描述、物体、属性、关系、区域图、场景图和问答对。图4显示了一张图像每个组成部分的示例。为了实现对图像的全面理解研究，我们首先收集描述和问答。这些是原始文本，没有长度或词汇限制。接下来，我们从描述中提取物体、属性和关系。物体、属性和关系共同构成了我们的场景图，它代表了图像的形式化表示。在本节中，我们分解图4并解释七个组成部分中的每一个。在第4节中，我们将更详细地描述如何通过众包平台收集每个组成部分的数据。

items.en: In a real-world image, one simple summary sentence is often insufficient to describe all the contents of and interactions in an image. Instead, one natural way to extend this might be a collection of descriptions based on different regions of a scene. In Visual Genome, we collect human-generated image region descriptions, with each region localized by a bounding box. In Figure 5, we show three examples of region descriptions. Regions are allowed to have a high degree of overlap with each other when the descriptions differ. For example, “yellow fire hydrant” and “woman in shorts is standing behind the man” have very little overlap, while “man jumping over fire hydrant” has a very high overlap with the other two regions. Our dataset contains on average a total of 424242 region descriptions per image. Each description is a phrase ranging from 111 to 161616 words in length describing that region.
items.zh: 在真实世界的图像中，一个简单的总结句通常不足以描述图像中的所有内容和交互。相反，一种自然的扩展方式可能是基于场景不同区域的描述集合。在Visual Genome中，我们收集人类生成的图像区域描述，每个区域通过边界框定位。在图5中，我们展示了三个区域描述的示例。当描述不同时，区域允许有高度重叠。例如，“黄色消防栓”和“穿短裤的女人站在男人后面”几乎没有重叠，而“男人跳过消防栓”与其他两个区域有很高的重叠。我们的数据集每张图像平均包含总共42个区域描述。每个描述是一个长度从1到16个单词的短语，描述该区域。

items.capEn: Figure 5: To describe all the contents of and interactions in an image, the Visual Genome dataset includes multiple human-generated image regions descriptions, with each region localized by a bounding box. Here, we show three regions descriptions: “man jumping over a fire hydrant,” “yellow fire hydrant,” and “woman in shorts is standing beghind the man.”
items.capZh: 图5：为了描述图像中的所有内容和交互，Visual Genome数据集包括多个人类生成的图像区域描述，每个区域通过边界框定位。这里，我们展示了三个区域描述：“男人跳过消防栓”、“黄色消防栓”和“穿短裤的女人站在男人后面”。

items.capEn: Figure 6: From all of the region descriptions, we extract all objects mentioned. For example, from the region description “man jumping over a fire hydrant,” we extract man and fire hydrant.
items.capZh: 图6：从所有区域描述中，我们提取所有提到的物体。例如，从区域描述“男人跳过消防栓”中，我们提取男人和消防栓。

full.sec: 2.2 Multiple objects and their bounding boxes

items.en: Each image in our dataset consists of an avarege of 212121 objects, each delineated by a tight bounding box (Figure 6). Furthermore, each object is canonicalized to a synset ID in WordNet Miller, (1995). For example, man and person would get mapped to man.n.03 (the generic use of the word to refer to any human being). Similarly, person gets mapped to person.n.01 (a human being). Afterwards, these two concepts can be joined to person.n.01 since this is a hypernym of man.n.03. This is an important standardization step to avoid multiple names for one object (e.g. man, person, human), and to connect information across images.
items.zh: 我们数据集中的每张图像平均包含21个物体，每个物体由一个紧密的边界框描绘（图6）。此外，每个物体被规范化到WordNet Miller, (1995)中的一个同义词集ID。例如，man和person会被映射到man.n.03（该词泛指任何人类的通用用法）。类似地，person被映射到person.n.01（一个人）。之后，这两个概念可以连接到person.n.01，因为它是man.n.03的上位词。这是一个重要的标准化步骤，以避免一个物体有多个名称（例如man、person、human），并连接跨图像的信息。

items.capEn: Figure 7: Some descriptions also provide attributes for objects. For example, the region description “yellow fire hydrant” adds that the fire hydrant is yellow. Here we show two attributes: yellow and standing.
items.capZh: 图7：一些描述还提供了物体的属性。例如，区域描述“黄色消防栓”添加了消防栓是黄色的信息。这里我们展示了两个属性：黄色和站立。

items.en: Each image in Visual Genome has an average of 16 attributes. Objects can have zero or more attributes associated with them. Attributes can be color (yellow), states (standing), etc. (Figure 7). Just like we extract objects from region descriptions, we also extract the attributes attached to these objects. In Figure 7, from the phrase “yellow fire hydrant,” we extract the attribute yellow for the fire hydrant. As with objects, we canonicalize all attributes to WordNet Miller, (1995); for example, yellow is mapped to yellow.s.01 (of the color intermediate between green and orange in the color spectrum; of something resembling the color of an egg yolk).
items.zh: Visual Genome 中的每张图像平均有 16 个属性。对象可以具有零个或多个与之关联的属性。属性可以是颜色（黄色）、状态（站立）等（图 7）。就像我们从区域描述中提取对象一样，我们也提取附加到这些对象的属性。在图 7 中，从短语“黄色消防栓”中，我们为消防栓提取属性黄色。与对象一样，我们将所有属性规范化为 WordNet Miller, (1995)；例如，黄色映射到 yellow.s.01（介于绿色和橙色之间的颜色；类似于蛋黄颜色的东西）。

items.en: Relationships connect two objects together. These relationships can be actions (jumping over), spatial (is behind), verbs (wear), prepositions (with), comparative (taller than), or prepositional phrases (drive on). For example, from the region description “man jumping over fire hydrant,” we extract the relationship jumping over between the objects man and fire hydrant (Figure 8). These relationships are directed from one object, called the subject, to another, called the object. In this case, the subject is the man, who is performing the relationship jumping over on the object fire hydrant. Each relationship is canonicalized to a WordNet Miller, (1995) synset ID; i.e. jumping is canonicalized to jump.a.1 (move forward by leaps and bounds). On average, each image in our dataset contains 18 relationships.
items.zh: 关系将两个对象连接在一起。这些关系可以是动作（跳过）、空间（在后面）、动词（穿）、介词（用）、比较级（比……高）或介词短语（在……上行驶）。例如，从区域描述“跳过消防栓的男人”中，我们提取对象男人和消防栓之间的关系跳过（图 8）。这些关系从一个对象（称为主语）指向另一个对象（称为宾语）。在这种情况下，主语是男人，他对宾语消防栓执行关系跳过。每个关系都被规范化为 WordNet Miller, (1995) 同义词集 ID；即 jumping 被规范化为 jump.a.1（通过跳跃向前移动）。平均而言，我们数据集中的每张图像包含 18 个关系。

items.capEn: Figure 8: Our dataset also captures the relationships and interactions between objects in our images. In this example, we show the relationship jumping over between the objects man and fire hydrant.
items.capZh: 图 8：我们的数据集还捕捉了图像中对象之间的关系和交互。在此示例中，我们展示了对象男人和消防栓之间的关系跳过。

items.en: Combining the objects, attributes, and relationships extracted from region descriptions, we create a directed graph representation for each of the 424242 regions. Examples of region graphs are shown in Figure 4. Each region graph is a structured representation of a part of the image. The nodes in the graph represent objects, attributes, and relationships. Objects are linked to their respective attributes while relationships link one object to another. The links connecting two objects in Figure 4 point from the subject to the relationship and from the relationship to the other object.
items.zh: 结合从区域描述中提取的对象、属性和关系，我们为 424242 个区域中的每一个创建了一个有向图表示。区域图的示例见图 4。每个区域图是图像一部分的结构化表示。图中的节点表示对象、属性和关系。对象链接到它们各自的属性，而关系将一个对象链接到另一个对象。图 4 中连接两个对象的链接从主语指向关系，再从关系指向另一个对象。

items.en: While region graphs are localized representations of an image, we also combine them into a single scene graph representing the entire image (Figure 3). The scene graph is the union of all region graphs and contains all objects, attributes, and relationships from each region description. By doing so, we are able to combine multiple levels of scene information in a more coherent way. For example in Figure 4, the leftmost region description tells us that the “fire hydrant is yellow,” while the middle region description tells us that the “man is jumping over the fire hydrant.” Together, the two descriptions tell us that the “man is jumping over a yellow fire hydrant.”
items.zh: 虽然区域图是图像的局部表示，但我们也将它们组合成一个表示整个图像的单一场景图（图 3）。场景图是所有区域图的并集，包含来自每个区域描述的所有对象、属性和关系。通过这样做，我们能够以更连贯的方式组合多个层次的场景信息。例如，在图 4 中，最左边的区域描述告诉我们“消防栓是黄色的”，而中间的区域描述告诉我们“男人正在跳过消防栓”。这两个描述一起告诉我们“男人正在跳过黄色的消防栓”。

full.sec: 2.7 A set of question answer pairs

items.en: We have two types of QA pairs associated with each image in our dataset: freeform QAs, based on the entire image, and region-based QAs, based on selected regions of the image. We collect 6 different types of questions per image: what, where, how, when, who, and why. In Figure 4, “Q. What is the woman standing next to?; A. Her belongings” is a freeform QA. Each image has at least one question of each type listed above. Region-based QAs are collected by prompting workers with region descriptions. For example, we use the region “yellow fire hydrant” to collect the region-based QA: “Q. What color is the fire hydrant?; A. Yellow.” Region based QAs allow us to independently study methods that use NLP and vision priors to answer questions.
items.zh: 我们的数据集中每张图像有两种类型的问答对：基于整个图像的自由形式问答，以及基于图像选定区域的基于区域的问答。我们为每张图像收集 6 种不同类型的问题：什么、哪里、如何、何时、谁和为什么。在图 4 中，“问：女人站在什么旁边？答：她的物品”是一个自由形式问答。每张图像至少有一个上述每种类型的问题。基于区域的问答是通过用区域描述提示工作人员来收集的。例如，我们使用区域“黄色消防栓”来收集基于区域的问答：“问：消防栓是什么颜色？答：黄色。”基于区域的问答使我们能够独立研究使用 NLP 和视觉先验来回答问题的方法。

items.en: We discuss existing datasets that have been released and used by the vision community for classification and object detection. We also mention work that has improved object and attribute detection models. Then, we explore existing work that has utilized representations similar to our relationships between objects. In addition, we dive into literature related to cognitive tasks like image description, question answering, and knowledge representation.
items.zh: 我们讨论了视觉社区已发布并用于分类和对象检测的现有数据集。我们还提到了改进对象和属性检测模型的工作。然后，我们探讨了利用类似于我们对象间关系的表示的现有工作。此外，我们深入研究了与认知任务相关的文献，如图像描述、问答和知识表示。

items.en: Datasets (Table 1) have been growing in size as researchers have begun tackling increasingly complicated problems. Caltech 101 Fei-Fei et al., (2007) was one of the first datasets hand-curated for image classification, with 101 object categories and 151515-303030 of examples per category. One of the biggest criticisms of Caltech 101 was the lack of variability in its examples. Caltech 256 Griffin et al., (2007) increased the number of categories to 256, while also addressing some of the shortcomings of Caltech 101. However, it still had only a handful of examples per category, and most of its images contained only a single object. LabelMe Russell et al., (2008) introduced a dataset with multiple objects per category. They also provided a web interface that experts and novices could use to annotate additional images. This web interface enabled images to be labeled with polygons, helping create datasets for image segmentation. The Lotus Hill dataset Yao et al., (2007) contains a hierarchical decomposition of objects (vehicles, man-made objects, animals, etc.) along with segmentations. Only a small part of this dataset is freely available. SUN Xiao et al., (2010), just like LabelMe Russell et al., (2008) and Lotus Hill Yao et al., (2007), was curated for object detection. Pushing the size of datasets even further, 808080 Million Tiny Images Torralba et al., (2008) created a significantly larger dataset than its predecessors. It contains tiny (i.e. 32×32323232\times 32 pixels) images that were collected using WordNet Miller, (1995) synsets as queries. However, because the data in 808080 Million Images were not human-verified, they contain numerous errors. YFCC100M Thomee et al., (2016) is another large database of 100100100 million images that is still largely unexplored. It contains human generated and machine generated tags.
items.zh: 数据集（表 1）随着研究人员开始解决日益复杂的问题而不断增长。Caltech 101 Fei-Fei et al., (2007) 是最早为图像分类手工整理的数据集之一，包含 101 个对象类别，每个类别有 15-30 个示例。Caltech 101 最大的批评之一是其示例缺乏变异性。Caltech 256 Griffin et al., (2007) 将类别数量增加到 256，同时解决了 Caltech 101 的一些缺点。然而，每个类别仍然只有少量示例，并且其大多数图像只包含单个对象。LabelMe Russell et al., (2008) 引入了一个每个类别包含多个对象的数据集。他们还提供了一个网络界面，专家和新手都可以使用它来注释更多图像。这个网络界面使得可以用多边形标记图像，有助于创建用于图像分割的数据集。Lotus Hill 数据集 Yao et al., (2007) 包含对象（车辆、人造物体、动物等）的层次分解以及分割。该数据集只有一小部分免费可用。SUN Xiao et al., (2010) 与 LabelMe Russell et al., (2008) 和 Lotus Hill Yao et al., (2007) 一样，是为对象检测而整理的。进一步推动数据集规模，80 Million Tiny Images Torralba et al., (2008) 创建了一个比其前身大得多的数据集。它包含使用 WordNet Miller, (1995) 同义词集作为查询收集的小图像（即 32×32 像素）。然而，由于 80 Million Images 中的数据未经人工验证，因此包含大量错误。YFCC100M Thomee et al., (2016) 是另一个包含 1 亿张图像的大型数据库，目前仍 largely unexplored。它包含人类生成和机器生成的标签。

items.en: Pascal VOC Everingham et al., (2010) pushed research from classification to object detection with a dataset containing 202020 semantic categories in 11,0001100011,000 images. Imagenet Deng et al., (2009) took WordNet synsets and crowdsourced a large dataset of 14 million images. They started the ILSVRC Russakovsky et al., (2015) challenge for a variety of computer vision tasks. ILSVRC and PASCAL provide a test bench for object detection, image classification, object segmentation, person layout, and action classification. MS-COCO Lin et al., (2014) recently released its dataset, with over 328,000328000328,000 images with sentence descriptions and segmentations of 919191 object categories. The current largest dataset for QA, VQA Antol et al., (2015), contains 204,721204721204,721 images annotated with one or more question answers. They collected a dataset of 614,163614163614,163 freeform questions with 6.16.16.1M ground truth answers and provided a baseline approach in answering questions using an image and a textual question as the input.
items.zh: Pascal VOC Everingham et al., (2010) 将研究从分类推向对象检测，其数据集包含 11,000 张图像中的 20 个语义类别。Imagenet Deng et al., (2009) 利用 WordNet 同义词集，众包了一个包含 1400 万张图像的大型数据集。他们发起了 ILSVRC Russakovsky et al., (2015) 挑战赛，涵盖多种计算机视觉任务。ILSVRC 和 PASCAL 为对象检测、图像分类、对象分割、人物布局和动作分类提供了测试平台。MS-COCO Lin et al., (2014) 最近发布了其数据集，包含超过 328,000 张图像，带有句子描述和 91 个对象类别的分割。目前最大的问答数据集 VQA Antol et al., (2015) 包含 204,721 张图像，每张图像带有一个或多个问题答案。他们收集了 614,163 个自由形式问题，包含 610 万个真实答案，并提供了一个基线方法，以图像和文本问题作为输入来回答问题。

items.en: Visual Genome aims to bridge the gap between all these datasets, collecting not just annotations for a large number of objects but also scene graphs, region descriptions, and question answer pairs for image regions. Unlike previous datasets, which were collected for a single task like image classification, the Visual Genome dataset was collected to be a general-purpose representation of the visual world, without bias toward a particular task. Our images contain an average of 212121 objects, which is almost an order of magnitude more dense than any existing vision dataset. Similarly, we contain an average of 181818 attributes and 181818 relationships per image. We also have an order of magnitude more unique objects, attributes, and relationships than any other dataset. Finally, we have 1.7 million question answer pairs, also larger than any other dataset for visual question answering.
items.zh: Visual Genome 旨在弥合所有这些数据集之间的差距，不仅收集大量对象的注释，还收集场景图、区域描述和图像区域的问答对。与之前为单一任务（如图像分类）收集的数据集不同，Visual Genome 数据集被收集为视觉世界的通用表示，没有偏向于特定任务。我们的图像平均包含 21 个对象，这几乎比任何现有视觉数据集密集一个数量级。类似地，每张图像平均包含 18 个属性和 18 个关系。我们还拥有比其他任何数据集多一个数量级的独特对象、属性和关系。最后，我们有 170 万个问答对，也比任何其他视觉问答数据集大。

items.en: One of the core contributions of Visual Genome is its descriptions for multiple regions in an image. As such, we mention other image description datasets and models in this subsection. Most work related to describing images can be divided into two categories: retrieval of human-generated captions and generation of novel captions. Methods in the first category use similarity metrics between image features from predefined models to retrieve similar sentences Ordonez et al., (2011); Hodosh et al., (2013). Other methods map both sentences and their images to a common vector space Ordonez et al., (2011) or map them to a space of triples Farhadi et al., (2010). Among those in the second category, a common theme has been to use recurrent neural networks to produce novel captions Kiros et al., (2014); Mao et al., (2014); Karpathy and Fei-Fei, (2014); Vinyals et al., (2014). More recently, researchers have also used a visual attention model Xu et al., (2015).
items.zh: Visual Genome 的核心贡献之一是其对图像中多个区域的描述。因此，我们在本小节中提及其他图像描述数据集和模型。大多数与描述图像相关的工作可以分为两类：检索人类生成的标题和生成新颖的标题。第一类方法使用预定义模型中的图像特征之间的相似性度量来检索相似的句子 Ordonez et al., (2011); Hodosh et al., (2013)。其他方法将句子及其图像映射到公共向量空间 Ordonez et al., (2011) 或将它们映射到三元组空间 Farhadi et al., (2010)。在第二类方法中，一个共同的主题是使用循环神经网络来生成新颖的标题 Kiros et al., (2014); Mao et al., (2014); Karpathy and Fei-Fei, (2014); Vinyals et al., (2014)。最近，研究人员还使用了视觉注意力模型 Xu et al., (2015)。

items.en: One drawback of these approaches is their attention to describing only the most salient aspect of the image. This problem is amplified by datasets like Flickr 30K Young et al., (2014) and MS-COCO Lin et al., (2014), whose sentence desriptions tend to focus, somewhat redundantly, on these salient parts. For example, “an elephant is seen wandering around on a sunny day,” “a large elephant in a tall grass field,” and “a very large elephant standing alone in some brush” are 3 descriptions from the MS-COCO dataset, and all of them focus on the salient elephant in the image and ignore the other regions in the image. Many real-world scenes are complex, with multiple objects and interactions that are best described using multiple descriptions Karpathy and Fei-Fei, (2014); Lebret et al., (2015). Our dataset pushes toward a complete understanding of an image by collecting a dataset in which we capture not just scene-level descriptions but also myriad of low-level descriptions, the “grammar” of the scene.
items.zh: 这些方法的一个缺点是它们只关注描述图像中最显著的部分。这个问题被 Flickr 30K Young et al., (2014) 和 MS-COCO Lin et al., (2014) 等数据集放大，它们的句子描述往往有些冗余地将注意力集中在这些显著部分上。例如，“一头大象在晴天里漫步”、“一头在茂密草地中的大象”和“一头独自站在灌木丛中的非常大的大象”是 MS-COCO 数据集中的 3 个描述，它们都关注图像中显著的大象，而忽略了图像中的其他区域。许多现实世界的场景是复杂的，具有多个对象和交互，最好使用多个描述来描述 Karpathy and Fei-Fei, (2014); Lebret et al., (2015)。我们的数据集通过收集不仅包含场景级描述还包含大量低级描述（场景的“语法”）的数据集，推动了对图像的完整理解。

items.en: Object detection is a fundamental task in computer vision, with applications ranging from identification of faces in photo software to identification of other cars by self-driving cars on the road. It involves classifying an object into a semantic category and localizing the object in the image. Visual Genome uses objects as a core component on which each visual scene is built. Early datasets include the face detectio Huang et al., (2008) and pedestrian datasets Dollar et al., (2012). The PASCAL VOC and ILSVRC’s detection dataset Deng et al., (2009) pushed research in object detection. But the images in these datasets are iconic and do not capture the settings in which these objects usually co-occur. To remedy this problem, MS-COCO Lin et al., (2014) annotated real-world scenes that capture object contexts. However, MS-COCO was unable to describe all the objects in its images, since they annotated only 91 object categories. In the real world, there are many more objects that the ones captured by existing datasets. Visual Genome aims at collecting annotations for all visual elements that occur in images, increasing the number of semantic categories to over 17,000.
items.zh: 对象检测是计算机视觉中的一项基本任务，其应用范围从照片软件中的人脸识别到道路上自动驾驶汽车对其他汽车的识别。它涉及将对象分类为语义类别并在图像中定位对象。Visual Genome 将对象作为每个视觉场景构建的核心组件。早期数据集包括人脸检测 Huang et al., (2008) 和行人数据集 Dollar et al., (2012)。PASCAL VOC 和 ILSVRC 的检测数据集 Deng et al., (2009) 推动了对象检测的研究。但这些数据集中的图像是标志性的，没有捕捉到这些对象通常共同出现的场景。为了解决这个问题，MS-COCO Lin et al., (2014) 注释了捕捉对象上下文的现实世界场景。然而，MS-COCO 无法描述其图像中的所有对象，因为它们只注释了 91 个对象类别。在现实世界中，还有比现有数据集捕捉到的更多的对象。Visual Genome 旨在收集图像中所有视觉元素的注释，将语义类别数量增加到超过 17,000 个。

items.en: The inclusion of attributes allows us to describe, compare, and more easily categorize objects. Even if we haven’t seen an object before, attributes allow us to infer something about it; for example, “yellow and brown spotted with long neck” likely refers to a giraffe. Initial work in this area involved finding objects with similar features Malisiewicz et al., (2008) using examplar SVMs. Next, textures were used to study objects Varma and Zisserman, (2005), while other methods learned to predict colors Ferrari and Zisserman, (2007). Finally, the study of attributes was explicitly demonstrated to lead to improvements in object classification Farhadi et al., (2009). Attributes were defined to be paths (“has legs”), shapes (“spherical”), or materials (“furry”) and could be used to classify new categories of objects. Attributes have also played a large role in improving fine-grained recognition Goering et al., (2014) on fine-grained attribute datasets like CUB-2011 Wah et al., (2011). In Visual Genome, we use a generalized formulation Johnson et al., (2015), but we extend it such that attributes are not image-specific binaries but rather object-specific for each object in a real-world scene. We also extend the types of attributes to include size (“small”), pose (“bent”), state (“transparent”), emotion (“happy”), and many more.
items.zh: 包含属性使我们能够描述、比较和更容易地对对象进行分类。即使我们以前没有见过某个对象，属性也允许我们推断出关于它的一些信息；例如，“黄色和棕色斑点，长脖子”很可能指的是长颈鹿。该领域的早期工作涉及使用示例 SVM 寻找具有相似特征的对象 Malisiewicz et al., (2008)。接下来，纹理被用于研究对象 Varma and Zisserman, (2005)，而其他方法则学习预测颜色 Ferrari and Zisserman, (2007)。最后，属性的研究被明确证明可以改进对象分类 Farhadi et al., (2009)。属性被定义为路径（“有腿”）、形状（“球形”）或材料（“毛茸茸的”），并可用于分类新类别的对象。属性还在改进细粒度识别方面发挥了重要作用 Goering et al., (2014)，例如在 CUB-2011 Wah et al., (2011) 等细粒度属性数据集上。在 Visual Genome 中，我们使用了一个广义公式 Johnson et al., (2015)，但我们对其进行了扩展，使得属性不是特定于图像的二元属性，而是针对现实世界场景中每个对象的特定属性。我们还扩展了属性的类型，包括大小（“小”）、姿势（“弯曲”）、状态（“透明”）、情感（“快乐”）等等。

items.en: Relationship extraction has been a traditional problem in information extraction and in natural language processing. Syntactic features Zhou et al., (2007); GuoDong et al., (2005), dependency tree methods Culotta and Sorensen, (2004); Bunescu and Mooney, (2005), and deep neural networks Socher et al., (2012); Zeng et al., (2014) have been employed to extract relationships between two entities in a sentence. However, in computer vision, very little work has gone into learning or predicting relationships. Instead, relationships have been implicitly used to improve other vision tasks. Relative layouts between objects have improved scene categorization Izadinia et al., (2014), and 3D spatial geometry between objects has helped object detection Choi et al., (2013). Comparative adjectives and prepositions between pairs of objects have been used to model visual relationships and improved object localization Gupta and Davis, (2008).
items.zh: 关系提取一直是信息提取和自然语言处理中的传统问题。句法特征 Zhou et al., (2007); GuoDong et al., (2005)、依存树方法 Culotta and Sorensen, (2004); Bunescu and Mooney, (2005) 和深度神经网络 Socher et al., (2012); Zeng et al., (2014) 已被用于提取句子中两个实体之间的关系。然而，在计算机视觉中，很少有工作致力于学习或预测关系。相反，关系被隐式地用于改进其他视觉任务。对象之间的相对布局改进了场景分类 Izadinia et al., (2014)，对象之间的 3D 空间几何有助于对象检测 Choi et al., (2013)。对象对之间的比较形容词和介词已被用于建模视觉关系并改进对象定位 Gupta and Davis, (2008)。

items.en: Relationships have already shown their utility in improving cognitive tasks. A meaning space of relationships has improved the mapping of images to sentences Farhadi et al., (2010). Relationships in a structured representation with objects have been defined as a graph structure called a scene graph, where the nodes are objects with attributes and edges are relationships between objects. This representation can be used to generate indoor images from sentences and also to improve image search Chang et al., (2014); Johnson et al., (2015). We use a similar scene graph representation of an image that generalizes across all these previous works Johnson et al., (2015). Recently, relationships have come into focus again in the form of question answering about associations between objects Sadeghi et al., (2015). These questions ask if a relationship, involving generally two objects, is true, e.g. “do dogs eat ice cream?”. We believe that relationships will be necessary for higher-level cognitive tasks Johnson et al., (2015); Lu et al., (2016), so we collect the largest corpus of them in an attempt to improve tasks by actually understanding relationships between objects.
items.zh: 关系已经显示出它们在改进认知任务方面的效用。关系意义空间改进了图像到句子的映射 Farhadi et al., (2010)。结构化表示中的关系与对象一起被定义为称为场景图的图结构，其中节点是带有属性的对象，边是对象之间的关系。这种表示可用于从句子生成室内图像，并改进图像搜索 Chang et al., (2014); Johnson et al., (2015)。我们使用类似的图像场景图表示，它概括了所有这些先前的工作 Johnson et al., (2015)。最近，关系再次成为焦点，形式为关于对象之间关联的问答 Sadeghi et al., (2015)。这些问题询问一个通常涉及两个对象的关系是否为真，例如“狗吃冰淇淋吗？”。我们相信关系对于更高级的认知任务是必要的 Johnson et al., (2015); Lu et al., (2016)，因此我们收集了最大的关系语料库，试图通过真正理解对象之间的关系来改进任务。

items.en: Visual question answering (QA) has been recently proposed as a proxy task of evaluating a computer vision system’s ability to understand an image beyond object recognition Geman et al., (2015); Malinowski and Fritz, (2014). Several visual QA benchmarks have been proposed in the last few months. The DAQUAR Malinowski and Fritz, (2014) dataset was the first toy-sized QA benchmark built upon indoor scene RGB-D images of NYU Depth v2 Nathan Silberman and Fergus, (2012). Most new datasets Yu et al., (2015); Ren et al., 2015a ; Antol et al., (2015); Gao et al., (2015) have collected QA pairs on MS-COCO images, either generated automatically by NLP tools Ren et al., 2015a or written by human workers Yu et al., (2015); Antol et al., (2015); Gao et al., (2015).
items.zh: 视觉问答（QA）最近被提议作为评估计算机视觉系统超越对象识别理解图像能力的代理任务 Geman et al., (2015); Malinowski and Fritz, (2014)。在过去的几个月里，已经提出了几个视觉问答基准。DAQUAR Malinowski and Fritz, (2014) 数据集是第一个基于 NYU Depth v2 Nathan Silberman and Fergus, (2012) 的室内场景 RGB-D 图像构建的玩具级问答基准。大多数新数据集 Yu et al., (2015); Ren et al., 2015a ; Antol et al., (2015); Gao et al., (2015) 在 MS-COCO 图像上收集了问答对，要么由 NLP 工具自动生成 Ren et al., 2015a，要么由人类工作者编写 Yu et al., (2015); Antol et al., (2015); Gao et al., (2015)。

items.en: In previous datasets, most questions concentrated on simple recognition-based questions about the salient objects, and answers were often extremely short. For instance, 90%percent9090\% of DAQUAR answers Malinowski and Fritz, (2014) and 87%percent8787\% of VQA answers Antol et al., (2015) consist of single-word object names, attributes, and quantities. This shortness limits their diversity and fails to capture the long-tail details of the images. Given the availability of new datasets, an array of visual QA models have been proposed to tackle QA tasks. The proposed models range from SVM classifiers Antol et al., (2015) and probabilistic inference Malinowski and Fritz, (2014) to recurrent neural networks Gao et al., (2015); Malinowski et al., (2015); Ren et al., 2015a and convolutional networks Ma et al., (2015). Visual Genome aims to capture the details of the images with diverse question types and long answers. These questions should cover a wide range of visual tasks from basic perception to complex reasoning. Our QA dataset of 1.71.71.7 million QAs is also larger than any currently existing dataset.
items.zh: 在以前的数据集中，大多数问题集中在关于显著对象的简单基于识别的问题上，答案通常非常简短。例如，DAQUAR 答案的 90% Malinowski and Fritz, (2014) 和 VQA 答案的 87% Antol et al., (2015) 由单字对象名称、属性和数量组成。这种简短限制了它们的多样性，并且未能捕捉到图像的长尾细节。鉴于新数据集的可用性，已经提出了一系列视觉问答模型来应对问答任务。提出的模型范围从 SVM 分类器 Antol et al., (2015) 和概率推理 Malinowski and Fritz, (2014) 到循环神经网络 Gao et al., (2015); Malinowski et al., (2015); Ren et al., 2015a 和卷积网络 Ma et al., (2015)。Visual Genome 旨在通过多样的问题类型和长答案来捕捉图像的细节。这些问题应涵盖从基本感知到复杂推理的广泛视觉任务。我们包含 170 万个问答的问答数据集也比任何现有数据集都大。

items.en: A knowledge representation of the visual world is capable of tackling an array of vision tasks, from action recognition to general question answering. However, it is difficult to answer “what is the minimal viable set of knowledge needed to understand about the physical world?” Hayes, (1978). It was later proposed that there be a certain plurality to concepts and their related axioms Hayes, (1985). These efforts have grown to model physical processes Forbus, (1984) or to model a series of actions as scripts Schank and Abelson, (2013) for stories—both of which are not depicted in a single static image but which play roles in an image’s story. More recently, NELL Betteridge et al., (2009) learns probabilistic horn clauses by extracting information from the web. DeepQA Ferrucci et al., (2010) proposes a probabilistic question answering architecture involving over 100100100 different techniques. Others have used Markov logic networks Zhu et al., (2009); Niu et al., (2012) as their representation to perform statistical inference for knowledge base construction. Our work is most similar to that of those Chen et al., (2013); Zhu et al., (2014, 2015); Sadeghi et al., (2015) who attempt to learn common-sense relationships from images. Visual Genome scene graphs can also be considered a dense knowledge representation for images. It is similar to the format used in knowledge bases in NLP.
items.zh: 视觉世界的知识表示能够处理一系列视觉任务，从动作识别到通用问答。然而，很难回答“理解物理世界所需的最小可行知识集是什么？” Hayes, (1978)。后来有人提出，概念及其相关公理应具有一定的多元性 Hayes, (1985)。这些努力已经发展到对物理过程进行建模 Forbus, (1984) 或将一系列动作建模为故事的脚本 Schank and Abelson, (2013)——这两者都不是在单个静态图像中描绘的，但在图像的故事中发挥作用。最近，NELL Betteridge et al., (2009) 通过从网络提取信息来学习概率霍恩子句。DeepQA Ferrucci et al., (2010) 提出了一种概率问答架构，涉及超过 100 种不同的技术。其他人使用马尔可夫逻辑网络 Zhu et al., (2009); Niu et al., (2012) 作为其表示，以进行知识库构建的统计推理。我们的工作与那些试图从图像中学习常识关系的 Chen et al., (2013); Zhu et al., (2014, 2015); Sadeghi et al., (2015) 最为相似。Visual Genome 场景图也可以被视为图像的密集知识表示。它类似于 NLP 中知识库使用的格式。

items.en: Visual Genome was collected and verified entirely by crowd workers from Amazon Mechanical Turk. In this section, we outline the pipeline employed in creating all the components of the dataset. Each component (region descriptions, objects, attributes, relationships, region graphs, scene graphs, questions and answers) involved multiple task stages. We mention the different strategies used to make our data accurate and to enforce diversity in each component. We also provide background information about the workers who helped make Visual Genome possible.
items.zh: Visual Genome 完全由来自 Amazon Mechanical Turk 的众包工作人员收集和验证。在本节中，我们概述了用于创建数据集所有组件的流程。每个组件（区域描述、对象、属性、关系、区域图、场景图、问题和答案）都涉及多个任务阶段。我们提到了用于使数据准确并在每个组件中强制多样性的不同策略。我们还提供了有关帮助实现 Visual Genome 的工作人员的背景信息。

items.en: We used Amazon Mechanical Turk (AMT) as our primary source of annotations. Overall, a total of over 33,0003300033,000 unique workers contributed to the dataset. The dataset was collected over the course of 666 months after 151515 months of experimentation and iteration on the data representation. Approximately 800,000800000800,000 Human Intelligence Tasks (HITs) were launched on AMT, where each HIT involved creating descriptions, questions and answers, or region graphs. Each HIT was designed such that workers manage to earn anywhere between $666-$888 per hour if they work continuously, in line with ethical research standards on Mechanical Turk Salehi et al., (2015). Visual Genome HITs achieved a 94.194.194.1% retention rate, meaning that 94.194.194.1% of workers who completed one of our tasks went ahead to do more. Table 2 outlines the percentage distribution of the locations of the workers. 93.0293.0293.02% of workers contributed from the United States.
items.zh: 我们使用亚马逊土耳其机器人（AMT）作为主要注释来源。总体而言，共有超过33,000名独立工作者为数据集做出了贡献。该数据集在数据表示方面经过15个月的实验和迭代后，收集了6个月。在AMT上启动了约800,000个人工智能任务（HIT），每个HIT涉及创建描述、问答或区域图。每个HIT的设计使得工作者如果连续工作，每小时可赚取6至8美元，符合Mechanical Turk上的伦理研究标准（Salehi等，2015）。Visual Genome HITs实现了94.1%的留存率，意味着94.1%完成我们任务的工作者继续做了更多任务。表2列出了工作者所在地的百分比分布。93.02%的工作者来自美国。

items.en: Visual Genome’s main goal is to enable the study of cognitive computer vision tasks. The next step towards understanding images requires studying relationships between objects in scene graph representations of images. However, we observed that collecting scene graphs directly from an image leads to workers annotating easy, frequently-occurring relationships like wearing(man, shirt) instead of focusing on salient parts of the image. This is evident from previous datasets Johnson et al., (2015); Lu et al., (2016) that contain a large number of such relationships. After experimentation, we observed that when asked to describe an image using natural language, crowd workers naturally start with the most salient part of the image and then move to describing other parts of the image one by one. Inspired by this finding, we focused our attention towards collecting a dataset of region descriptions that is diverse in content.
items.zh: Visual Genome的主要目标是支持认知计算机视觉任务的研究。理解图像的下一步需要研究图像场景图表示中对象之间的关系。然而，我们观察到直接从图像收集场景图会导致工作者注释简单、频繁出现的关系，如“穿着（男人，衬衫）”，而不是关注图像的显著部分。这一点从之前的数据集（Johnson等，2015；Lu等，2016）中可以看出，这些数据集包含大量此类关系。经过实验，我们观察到当要求工作者用自然语言描述图像时，他们自然地从图像最显著的部分开始，然后逐一描述其他部分。受此发现启发，我们将注意力集中在收集内容多样化的区域描述数据集上。

items.en: When a new image is added to the crowdsourcing pipeline with no annotations, it is sent to a worker who is asked to draw three bounding boxes and write three descriptions for the region enclosed by each box. Next, the image is sent to another worker along with the previously written descriptions. Workers are explicitly encouraged to write descriptions that have not been written before. This process is repeated until we have collect 505050 region descriptions for each image. To prevent workers from having to skim through a long list of previously written descriptions, we only show them the top seven most similar descriptions. We calculate these most similar descriptions using BLEU Papineni et al., (2002) (n-gram) scores between pairs of sentences. We define the BLEU score between a description disubscript𝑑𝑖d_{i} and a previous description djsubscript𝑑𝑗d_{j} to be:
items.zh: 当一张新图像被添加到众包流程且没有注释时，它会被发送给一位工作者，要求其绘制三个边界框并为每个框所包围的区域编写三个描述。接下来，该图像连同之前编写的描述一起发送给另一位工作者。工作者被明确鼓励编写之前未写过的描述。重复此过程，直到我们为每张图像收集到50个区域描述。为防止工作者需要浏览一长串之前编写的描述，我们只向他们展示最相似的七个描述。我们使用BLEU（Papineni等，2002）（n-gram）分数计算句子对之间的这些最相似描述。我们将描述d_i与先前描述d_j之间的BLEU分数定义为：

items.en: where we enforce a brevity penalty using:
items.zh: 其中我们使用以下公式强制实施简洁惩罚：

items.en: and pnsubscript𝑝𝑛p_{n} calculates the percentage of n-grams in disubscript𝑑𝑖d_{i} that match n-grams in djsubscript𝑑𝑗d_{j}.
items.zh: 并且p_n计算d_i中与d_j中n-gram匹配的n-gram百分比。

items.en: When a worker writes a new description, we programmatically enforce that it has not been repeated by using BLEU score thresholds set to 0.70.70.7 to ensure that it is dissimilar to descriptions from both of the following two lists:
items.zh: 当工作者编写新描述时，我们通过将BLEU分数阈值设置为0.7来编程确保其未被重复，以确保它与以下两个列表中的描述都不相似：

items.en: Image-specific descriptions. A list of all previously written descriptions for that image.
items.zh: 图像特定描述：该图像所有先前编写的描述的列表。

items.en: Global image descriptions. A list of the top 100 most common written descriptions of all images in the dataset. This prevents very common phrases like “sky is blue” from dominating the set of region descriptions.
items.zh: 全局图像描述：数据集中所有图像最常见的100个描述的列表。这可以防止像“天空是蓝色的”这样的常见短语主导区域描述集。

items.en: Finally, we ask workers to draw bounding boxes that satisfy one requirement: coverage. The bounding box must cover all objects mentioned in the description. Figure 10 shows an example of a good box that covers both the street as well the car mentioned in the description, as well as an example of a bad box.
items.zh: 最后，我们要求工作者绘制满足一个要求的边界框：覆盖。边界框必须覆盖描述中提到的所有对象。图10显示了一个好的边界框示例，它同时覆盖了描述中提到的街道和汽车，以及一个不好的边界框示例。

items.capEn: Figure 10: Good (left) and bad (right) bounding boxes for the phrase “a street with a red car parked on the side,” judged on coverage.
items.capZh: 图10：对于短语“一条街道上停着一辆红色汽车”，根据覆盖性判断的好（左）和坏（右）边界框。

items.en: Once 505050 region descriptions are collected for an image, we extract the visual objects from each description. Each description is sent to one crowd worker, who extracts all the objects from the description and grounds each object as a bounding box in the image. For example, from Figure 4, let’s consider the description “woman in shorts is standing behind the man.” A worker would extract three objects: woman, shorts, and man. They would then draw a box around each of the objects. We require each bounding box to be drawn to satisfy two requirements: coverage and quality. Coverage has the same definition as described above in Section 4.2, where we ask workers to make sure that the bounding box covers the object completely (Figure 11). Quality requires that each bounding box be as tight as possible around its object such that if the box’s length or height were decreased by one pixel, it would no longer satisfy the coverage requirement. Since a one pixel error can be physically impossible for most workers, we relax the definition of quality to four pixels.
items.zh: 一旦为一张图像收集了50个区域描述，我们就从每个描述中提取视觉对象。每个描述被发送给一位众包工作者，工作者提取描述中的所有对象，并将每个对象在图像中定位为边界框。例如，从图4中，考虑描述“穿短裤的女人站在男人后面”。工作者将提取三个对象：女人、短裤和男人。然后他们将为每个对象绘制一个框。我们要求每个边界框满足两个要求：覆盖性和质量。覆盖性的定义与上述第4.2节相同，我们要求工作者确保边界框完全覆盖对象（图11）。质量要求每个边界框尽可能紧贴其对象，使得如果框的长度或高度减少一个像素，它将不再满足覆盖性要求。由于一个像素的误差对大多数工作者来说可能物理上不可能，我们将质量的定义放宽到四个像素。

items.capEn: Figure 11: Good (left) and bad (right) bounding boxes for the object fox, judged on both coverage as well as quality.
items.capZh: 图11：对于对象“狐狸”，根据覆盖性和质量判断的好（左）和坏（右）边界框。

items.en: Multiple descriptions for an image might refer to the same object, sometimes with different words. For example, a man in one description might be referred to as person in another description. We can thus use this crowdsourcing stage to build these co-reference chains. With each region description given to a worker to process, we include a list of previously extracted objects as suggestions. This allows a worker to choose a previously drawn box annotated as man instead of redrawing a new box for person.
items.zh: 一张图像的多个描述可能指向同一个对象，有时使用不同的词语。例如，一个描述中的“男人”可能在另一个描述中被称为“人”。因此，我们可以利用这个众包阶段来构建这些共指链。对于每个交给工作者处理的区域描述，我们包含一个先前提取的对象列表作为建议。这允许工作者选择之前绘制为“男人”的框，而不是为“人”重新绘制一个新框。

items.en: Finally, to increase the speed with which workers complete this task, we also use Stanford’s dependency parser Manning et al., (2014) to extract nouns automatically and send them to the workers as suggestions. While the parser manages to find most of the nouns, it sometimes misses compound nouns, so we avoided completely depending on this automated method. By combining the parser with crowdsourcing tasks, we were able to speed up our object extraction process without losing accuracy.
items.zh: 最后，为了提高工作者完成此任务的速度，我们还使用斯坦福的依存解析器（Manning等，2014）自动提取名词并将其作为建议发送给工作者。虽然解析器能够找到大多数名词，但有时会遗漏复合名词，因此我们避免完全依赖这种自动化方法。通过将解析器与众包任务相结合，我们能够在不损失准确性的情况下加快对象提取过程。

items.en: Once all objects have been extracted from each region description, we can extract the attributes and relationships described in the region. We present each worker with a region description along with its extracted objects and ask them to add attributes to objects or to connect pairs of objects with relationships, based on the text of the description. From the description “woman in shorts is standing behind the man”, workers will extract the attribute standing for the woman and the relationships in(woman, shorts) and behind(woman, man). Together, objects, attributes, and relationships form the region graph for a region description. Some descriptions like “it is a sunny day” do not contain any objects and therefore have no region graphs associated with them. Workers are asked to not generate any graphs for such descriptions. We create scene graphs by combining all the region graphs for an image by combining all the co-referenced objects from different region graphs.
items.zh: 一旦从每个区域描述中提取了所有对象，我们就可以提取区域中描述的属性和关系。我们向每位工作者展示一个区域描述及其提取的对象，并要求他们根据描述文本为对象添加属性或将对象对与关系连接起来。从描述“穿短裤的女人站在男人后面”中，工作者将为女人提取属性“站立”，以及关系“在（女人，短裤）”和“在...后面（女人，男人）”。对象、属性和关系共同构成区域描述的区域图。一些描述如“这是一个晴天”不包含任何对象，因此没有与之关联的区域图。工作者被要求不为这样的描述生成任何图。我们通过合并来自不同区域图的共指对象，将所有区域图合并为图像的场景图。

items.en: The scene graph is the union of all region graphs extracted from region descriptions. We merge nodes from region graphs that correspond to the same object; for example, man and person in two different region graphs might refer to the same object in the image. We say that objects from different graphs refer to the same object if their bounding boxes have an overlap over union of 0.80.80.8. However, this heuristic might contain false positives. So, before merging two objects, we ask workers to confirm that a pair of objects with significant overlap are indeed the same object. For example, in Figure 12 (right), the fox might be extracted from two different region descriptions. These boxes are then combined together (Figure 12 (left)) when constructing the scene graph. Two region graphs are combined together by merging objects that are co-referenced by both the graphs.
items.zh: 场景图是从区域描述中提取的所有区域图的并集。我们合并来自不同区域图中对应同一对象的节点；例如，两个不同区域图中的“男人”和“人”可能指向图像中的同一对象。如果两个对象的边界框的交并比（IoU）为0.8，我们就认为它们指向同一对象。然而，这种启发式方法可能包含误报。因此，在合并两个对象之前，我们要求工作者确认具有显著重叠的一对对象确实是同一对象。例如，在图12（右）中，狐狸可能从两个不同的区域描述中提取出来。这些框在构建场景图时被合并在一起（图12（左））。两个区域图通过合并两个图共指的对象而组合在一起。

items.capEn: Figure 12: Each object (fox) has only one bounding box referring to it (left). Multiple boxes drawn for the same object (right) are combined together if they have a minimum threshold of 0.90.90.9 intersection over union.
items.capZh: 图12：每个对象（狐狸）只有一个边界框指向它（左）。如果多个为同一对象绘制的框（右）具有最小0.9的交并比阈值，则它们被合并在一起。

items.en: To create question answer (QA) pairs, we ask the AMT workers to write pairs of questions and answers about an image. To ensure quality, we instruct the workers to follow three rules: 1) start the questions with one of the “seven Ws” (who, what, where, when, why, how and which); 2) avoid ambiguous and speculative questions; 3) be precise and unique, and relate the question to the image such that it is clearly answerable if and only if the image is shown.
items.zh: 为了创建问答（QA）对，我们要求AMT工作者编写关于图像的问题和答案对。为确保质量，我们指示工作者遵循三条规则：1）以“七个W”（谁、什么、哪里、何时、为什么、如何和哪个）之一开头；2）避免模糊和推测性问题；3）精确且唯一，并将问题与图像相关联，使得只有在显示图像时才能明确回答。

items.en: We collected two separate types of QAs: freeform QAs and region-based QAs. In freeform QA, we ask a worker to look at an image and write eight QA pairs about it. To encourage diversity, we enforce that workers write at least three different Ws out of the seven in their eight pairs. In region-based QA, we ask the workers to write a pair based on a given region. We select the regions that have large areas (more than 5k pixels) and long phrases (more than 4 words). This enables us to collect around twenty region-based pairs at the same cost of the eight freeform QAs. In general, freeform QA tends to yield more diverse QA pairs that enrich the question distribution; region-based QA tends to produce more factual QA pairs at a lower cost.
items.zh: 我们收集了两种类型的问答：自由形式问答和基于区域的问答。在自由形式问答中，我们要求工作人员查看一张图片并编写八个关于该图片的问答对。为了鼓励多样性，我们要求工作人员在八个问答对中至少使用七个W中的三个不同W。在基于区域的问答中，我们要求工作人员根据给定的区域编写一个问答对。我们选择面积较大（超过5000像素）且短语较长（超过4个词）的区域。这使得我们能够以与八个自由形式问答相同的成本收集大约二十个基于区域的问答对。总的来说，自由形式问答倾向于产生更多样化的问答对，从而丰富问题分布；基于区域的问答倾向于以更低的成本产生更多事实性的问答对。

items.en: All Visual Genome data go through a verification stage as soon as they are annotated. This stage helps eliminate incorrectly labeled objects, attributes, and relationships. It also helps remove region descriptions and questions and answers that might be correct but are vague (“This person seems to enjoy the sun.”), subjective (“room looks dirty”), or opinionated (“Being exposed to hot sun like this may cause cancer”).
items.zh: 所有Visual Genome数据在标注后立即进入验证阶段。这一阶段有助于消除错误标记的对象、属性和关系。它还有助于删除那些可能正确但模糊（“这个人似乎喜欢阳光”）、主观（“房间看起来很脏”）或带有观点（“像这样暴露在烈日下可能导致癌症”）的区域描述和问答。

items.en: Verification is conducted using two separate strategies: majority voting Snow et al., (2008) and rapid judgments Krishna et al., (2016). All components of the dataset except objects are verified using majority voting. Majority votingSnow et al., (2008) involves three unique workers looking at each annotation and voting on whether it is factually correct. An annotation is added to our dataset if at least two (a majority) out of the three workers verify that it is correct.
items.zh: 验证采用两种不同的策略进行：多数投票（Snow et al., 2008）和快速判断（Krishna et al., 2016）。除对象外，数据集的所有组件均使用多数投票进行验证。多数投票（Snow et al., 2008）涉及三名不同的工作人员查看每个标注并投票判断其是否事实正确。如果三名工作人员中至少有两人（多数）验证其正确，则该标注被添加到我们的数据集中。

items.en: We only use rapid judgments to speed up the verification of the objects in our dataset. Meanwhile, rapid judgments Krishna et al., (2016) use an interface inspired by rapid serial visual processing that enable verification of objects with an order of magnitude increase in speed than majority voting.
items.zh: 我们仅使用快速判断来加速数据集中对象的验证。同时，快速判断（Krishna et al., 2016）使用受快速序列视觉呈现启发的界面，使得对象验证速度比多数投票提高一个数量级。

items.en: All the descriptions and QAs that we collect are freeform worker-generated texts. They are not constrained by any limitations. For example, we do not force workers to refer to a man in the image as a man. We allow them to choose to refer to the man as person, boy, man, etc. This ambiguity makes it difficult to collect all instances of man from our dataset. In order to reduce the ambiguity in the concepts of our dataset and connect it to other resources used by the research community, we map all objects, attributes, relationships, and noun phrases in region descriptions and QAs to synsets in WordNet Miller, (1995). In the example above, person, boy, and man would map to the synsets: person.n.01 (a human being), male_child.n.01 (a youthful male person) and man.n.03 (the generic use of the word to refer to any human being) respectively. Thanks to the WordNet hierarchy it is now possible to fuse those three expressions of the same concept into person.n.01 (a human being) since this is the lowest common ancestor node of all aforementioned synsets.
items.zh: 我们收集的所有描述和问答都是自由形式的工作人员生成文本，不受任何限制。例如，我们不强制工作人员将图像中的男性称为“man”。我们允许他们选择将男性称为“person”、“boy”、“man”等。这种模糊性使得从数据集中收集所有“man”的实例变得困难。为了减少数据集中概念的模糊性并将其与研究社区使用的其他资源连接起来，我们将区域描述和问答中的所有对象、属性、关系和名词短语映射到WordNet（Miller, 1995）中的同义词集。在上面的例子中，“person”、“boy”和“man”将分别映射到同义词集：person.n.01（人类）、male_child.n.01（年轻男性）和man.n.03（泛指任何人类）。借助WordNet的层次结构，现在可以将这三个表达同一概念的形式融合到person.n.01（人类）中，因为这是所有前述同义词集的最低共同祖先节点。

items.en: We use the Stanford NLP tools Manning et al., (2014) to extract the noun phrases from the region descriptions and QAs. Next, we map them to their most frequent matching synset in WordNet according to WordNet lexeme counts. We then refine this simple heuristic by hand-crafting mapping rules for the 30 most common failure cases. For example according to WordNet’s lexeme counts the most common semantic for “table” is table.n.01 (a set of data arranged in rows and columns). However in our data it is more likely to see pieces of furniture and therefore bias the mapping towards table.n.02 (a piece of furniture having a smooth flat top that is usually supported by one or more vertical legs). The objects in our scene graphs are already noun phrases and are mapped to WordNet in the same way.
items.zh: 我们使用Stanford NLP工具（Manning et al., 2014）从区域描述和问答中提取名词短语。然后，根据WordNet词位计数，将它们映射到WordNet中最频繁匹配的同义词集。我们通过为30个最常见的失败案例手工制定映射规则来改进这一简单启发式方法。例如，根据WordNet的词位计数，“table”最常见的语义是table.n.01（以行和列排列的数据集）。然而，在我们的数据中，更可能看到家具，因此将映射偏向table.n.02（一种家具，具有光滑平坦的顶部，通常由一个或多个垂直腿支撑）。我们场景图中的对象已经是名词短语，并以相同方式映射到WordNet。

items.en: We normalize each attribute based on morphology (so called “stemming”) and map them to the WordNet adjectives. We include 15 hand-crafted rules to address common failure cases, which typically occur when the concrete or spatial sense of the word seen in an image is not the most common overall sense. For example, the synset long.a.02 (of relatively great or greater than average spatial extension) is less common in WordNet than long.a.01 (indicating a relatively great or greater than average duration of time), even though instances of the word “long” in our images are much more likely to refer to that spatial sense.
items.zh: 我们根据形态学（即“词干提取”）对每个属性进行归一化，并将其映射到WordNet形容词。我们包含了15条手工制定的规则来处理常见失败案例，这些案例通常发生在图像中看到的词的具体或空间意义不是最常见的整体意义时。例如，同义词集long.a.02（相对较大或大于平均空间延伸）在WordNet中不如long.a.01（表示相对较大或大于平均持续时间）常见，尽管在我们的图像中“long”一词的实例更可能指代空间意义。

items.en: For relationships, we ignore all prepositions as they are not recognized by WordNet. Since the meanings of verbs are highly dependent upon their morphology and syntactic placement (e.g. passive cases, prepositional phrases), we try to find WordNet synsets whose sentence frames match with the context of the relationship. Sentence frames in WordNet are formalized syntactic frames in which a certain sense of a word might appear; for example, play.v.01: participate in games or sport occurs in the sentence frames “Somebody [play]s” and “Somebody [play]s something.” For each verb-synset pair, we then consider the root hypernym of that synset to reduce potential noise from WordNet’s fine-grained sense distinctions. The WordNet hierarchy for verbs is segmented and originates from over 100100100 root verbs. For example, draw.v.01: cause to move by pulling traces back to the root hypernym move.v.02: cause to move or shift into a new position, while draw.v.02: get or derive traces to the root get.v.01: come into the possession of something concrete or abstract. We also include 202020 hand-mapped rules, again to correct for WordNet’s lower representation of concrete or spatial senses.
items.zh: 对于关系，我们忽略所有介词，因为它们不被WordNet识别。由于动词的意义高度依赖于其形态和句法位置（例如被动语态、介词短语），我们尝试找到其句子框架与关系上下文匹配的WordNet同义词集。WordNet中的句子框架是形式化的句法框架，其中某个词义可能出现；例如，play.v.01：参与游戏或运动出现在句子框架“某人[play]”和“某人[play]某物”中。对于每个动词-同义词集对，我们考虑该同义词集的根上位词，以减少WordNet细粒度词义区分带来的潜在噪声。动词的WordNet层次结构是分段的，源自超过100个根动词。例如，draw.v.01：通过拉动使移动追溯到根上位词move.v.02：使移动或转移到新位置，而draw.v.02：获得或推导追溯到根get.v.01：获得某物具体或抽象的所有权。我们还包含了20条手工映射规则，再次用于纠正WordNet对具体或空间意义的较低表示。

items.en: These mappings are not perfect and still contain some ambiguity. Therefore, we send all our mappings along with the top four alternative synsets for each term to Amazon Mechanical Turk. We ask workers to verify that our mapping was accurate and change the mapping to an alternative one if it was a better fit. We present workers with the concept we want to canonicalize along with our proposed corresponding synset with 4 additional options. To prevent workers from always defaulting to the our proposed synset, we do not explicitly specify which one of the 5 synsets presented is our proposed synset. Section 5.8 provides experimental precision and recall scores for our canonicalization strategy.
items.zh: 这些映射并不完美，仍然包含一些模糊性。因此，我们将所有映射以及每个术语的前四个替代同义词集发送到Amazon Mechanical Turk。我们要求工作人员验证我们的映射是否准确，如果替代映射更合适，则更改映射。我们向工作人员展示要规范化的概念以及我们提出的相应同义词集，并附带4个额外选项。为了防止工作人员总是默认选择我们提出的同义词集，我们没有明确指定呈现的5个同义词集中哪一个是我们的提议。第5.8节提供了我们规范化策略的实验精确率和召回率分数。

items.capEn: Figure 13: A distribution of the top 252525 image synsets in the Visual Genome dataset. A variety of synsets are well represented in the dataset, with the top 252525 synsets having at least 800800800 example images each.
items.capZh: 图13：Visual Genome数据集中前25个图像同义词集的分布。数据集中各种同义词集都有很好的代表性，前25个同义词集每个至少有800张示例图像。

items.en: In this section, we provide statistical insights and analysis for each component of Visual Genome. Specifically, we examine the distribution of images (Section 5.1) and the collected data for region descriptions (Section 14) and questions and answers (Section 5.7). We analyze region graphs and scene graphs together in one section (Section 5.6), but we also break up these graph structures into their three constituent parts—objects (Section 5.3), attributes (Section 5.4), and relationships (Section 5.5)—and study each part individually. Finally, we describe our canonicalization pipeline and results (Section 5.8).
items.zh: 在本节中，我们为Visual Genom的每个组件提供统计见解和分析。具体来说，我们检查图像分布（第5.1节）以及收集的区域描述数据（第14节）和问答数据（第5.7节）。我们将区域图和场景图放在一节中分析（第5.6节），但也将这些图结构分解为三个组成部分——对象（第5.3节）、属性（第5.4节）和关系（第5.5节）——并分别研究每个部分。最后，我们描述我们的规范化流程和结果（第5.8节）。

items.en: The Visual Genome dataset consists of all 108,249108249108,249 images from the intersection of MS-COCO’s Lin et al., (2014) 328,000328000328,000 images and YFCC’s Thomee et al., (2016) 100100100 million images. These images are real-world, non-iconic images that were uploaded onto Flickr by users. The images range from as small as 727272 pixels wide to as large as 128012801280 pixels wide, with an average width of 500500500 pixels. We collected the WordNet synsets into which our 108,249108249108,249 images can be categorized using the same method as ImageNet Deng et al., (2009). Visual Genome images cover 972972972 synsets. Figure 13 shows the top synsets to which our images belong. “ski” is the most common synset, with 261226122612 images; it is followed by “ballplayer” and “racket,” with all three synsets referring to images of people playing sports. Our dataset is somewhat biased towards images of people, as Figure 13 shows; however, they are quite diverse overall, as the top 252525 synsets each have over 800800800 images, while the top 505050 synsets each have over 500 examples.
items.zh: Visual Genome数据集包含来自MS-COCO（Lin et al., 2014）328,000张图像和YFCC（Thomee et al., 2016）1亿张图像交集的全部108,249张图像。这些图像是用户上传到Flickr的真实世界、非标志性图像。图像宽度从72像素到1280像素不等，平均宽度为500像素。我们使用与ImageNet（Deng et al., 2009）相同的方法收集了可对108,249张图像进行分类的WordNet同义词集。Visual Genome图像覆盖972个同义词集。图13显示了我们的图像所属的前几个同义词集。“ski”是最常见的同义词集，有2612张图像；其次是“ballplayer”和“racket”，这三个同义词集都指代人们进行体育运动的图像。如图13所示，我们的数据集在一定程度上偏向于人物图像；然而，总体而言它们相当多样化，前25个同义词集每个都有超过800张图像，而前50个同义词集每个都有超过500个示例。

items.capEn: Figure 16: A distribution of the number of words in a region description. The average number of words in a region description is 555, with shortest descriptions of 111 word and longest descriptions of 161616 words.
items.capZh: 图16：区域描述中单词数量的分布。区域描述的平均单词数为5，最短描述为1个单词，最长描述为16个单词。

items.capEn: Figure 17: The process used to convert a region description into a 300-dimensional vectorized representation.
items.capZh: 图17：将区域描述转换为300维向量化表示的过程。

items.en: One of the primary components of Visual Genome is its region descriptions. Every image includes an average of 424242 regions with a bounding box and a descriptive phrase. Figure 14 shows an example image from our dataset with its 505050 region descriptions. We display bounding boxes for only 666 out of the 505050 descriptions in the figure to avoid clutter. These descriptions tend to be highly diverse and can focus on a single object, like in “A bag,” or on multiple objects, like in “Man taking a photo of the elephants.” They encompass the most salient parts of the image, as in “An elephant taking food from a woman,” while also capturing the background, as in “Small buildings surrounded by trees.”
items.zh: Visual Genome的主要组成部分之一是其区域描述。每张图像平均包含42个带有边界框和描述性短语的区域。图14显示了数据集中一张示例图像及其50个区域描述。为避免杂乱，我们在图中仅显示50个描述中的6个边界框。这些描述往往高度多样化，可以关注单个对象，如“一个包”，或多个对象，如“男子正在给大象拍照”。它们涵盖了图像中最显著的部分，如“大象从女人那里取食物”，同时也捕捉了背景，如“被树木环绕的小建筑”。

items.en: MS-COCO Lin et al., (2014) dataset is good at generating variations on a single scene-level descriptor. Consider three sentences from MS-COCO dataset on a similar image: “there is a person petting a very large elephant,” “a person touching an elephant in front of a wall,” and “a man in white shirt petting the cheek of an elephant.” These three sentences are single scene-level descriptions. In comparison, Visual Genome descriptions emphasize different regions in the image and thus are less semantically similar. To ensure diversity in the descriptions, we use BLEU score Papineni et al., (2002) thresholds between new descriptions and all previously written descriptions. More information about crowdsourcing can be found in Section 4.
items.zh: MS-COCO（Lin et al., 2014）数据集擅长生成单个场景级描述的变化。考虑MS-COCO数据集中关于类似图像的三句话：“有一个人正在抚摸一头非常大的大象”，“一个人在一堵墙前触摸一头大象”，以及“一个穿白衬衫的男人正在抚摸大象的脸颊”。这三句话是单个场景级描述。相比之下，Visual Genome描述强调图像中的不同区域，因此在语义上不太相似。为了确保描述的多样性，我们在新描述和所有先前编写的描述之间使用BLEU分数（Papineni et al., 2002）阈值。关于众包的更多信息可以在第4节中找到。

items.en: Region descriptions must be specific enough in an image to describe individual objects, like in the description “A bag,” but they must also be general enough to describe high-level concepts in an image, like “An man being chased by a bear.” Qualitatively, we note that regions that cover large portions of the image tend to be general descriptions of an image, while regions that cover only a small fraction of the image tend to be more specific. In Figure 15 (a), we show the distribution of regions over the width of the region normalized by the width of the image. We see that the majority of our regions tend to be around 10%percent1010\% to 15%percent1515\% of the image width. We also note that there are a large number of regions covering 100%percent100100\% of the image width. These regions usually include elements like “sky,” “ocean,” “snow,” “mountains,” etc. that cannot be bounded and thus span the entire image width. In Figure 15 (b), we show a similar distribution over the normalized height of the region. We see a similar overall pattern, as most of our regions tend to be very specific descriptions of about 10%percent1010\% to 15%percent1515\% of the image height. Unlike the distribution over width, however, we do not see a increase in the number of regions that span the entire height of the image, as there are no common visual equivalents that span images vertically. Out of all the descriptions gathered, only one or two of them tend to be global scene descriptions that are similar to MS-COCO Lin et al., (2014).
items.zh: 区域描述必须在图像中足够具体以描述单个对象，例如描述“一个包”，但也必须足够通用以描述图像中的高层概念，例如“一个被熊追赶的男人”。从定性角度看，我们注意到覆盖图像大部分区域的区域往往是图像的通用描述，而仅覆盖图像一小部分的区域则更具体。在图15(a)中，我们展示了区域宽度相对于图像宽度归一化后的分布。我们看到大多数区域的宽度约为图像宽度的10%到15%。我们还注意到有大量区域覆盖了图像宽度的100%。这些区域通常包含“天空”、“海洋”、“雪”、“山脉”等元素，这些元素无法被边界限定，因此横跨整个图像宽度。在图15(b)中，我们展示了区域高度归一化后的类似分布。我们看到类似的整体模式，大多数区域是非常具体的描述，约占图像高度的10%到15%。然而，与宽度分布不同，我们没有看到覆盖整个图像高度的区域数量增加，因为没有常见的视觉等效物垂直跨越图像。在所有收集的描述中，只有一两个是类似于MS-COCO (Lin et al., 2014) 的全局场景描述。

items.en: After examining the distribution of the size of the regions described, it is also valuable to look at the semantic information captured by these descriptions. In Figure 16, we show the distribution of the length (word count) of these region descriptions. The average word count for a description is 5 words, with a minimum of 1 word and a maximum of 12 words. In Figure 18 (a), we plot the most common phrases occurring in our region descriptions, with stop words removed. Common visual elements like “green grass,” “tree [in] distance,” and “blue sky” occur much more often than other, more nuanced elements like “fresh strawberry.” We also study descriptions with finer precision in Figure 18 (b), where we plot the most common words used in descriptions. Again, we eliminate stop words from our study. Colors like “white” and “black” are the most frequently used words to describe visual concepts; we conduct a similar study on other captioning datasets including MS-COCO Lin et al., (2014) and Flickr 30K Young et al., (2014) and find a similar distribution with colors occurring most frequently. Besides colors, we also see frequent occurrences of common objects like “man,” “tree,” and “sign” and of universal visual elements like “sky.”
items.zh: 在检查了所描述区域的大小分布后，研究这些描述所捕获的语义信息也很有价值。在图16中，我们展示了这些区域描述的长度（单词数）分布。描述的平均单词数为5个，最少1个单词，最多12个单词。在图18(a)中，我们绘制了区域描述中最常见的短语（去除停用词后）。常见的视觉元素如“绿草”、“远处的树”和“蓝天”出现的频率远高于其他更细微的元素，如“新鲜草莓”。我们还在图18(b)中研究了更精细的描述，绘制了描述中最常用的单词。同样，我们移除了停用词。像“白色”和“黑色”这样的颜色是描述视觉概念最常用的词；我们对其他字幕数据集（包括MS-COCO (Lin et al., 2014) 和Flickr 30K (Young et al., 2014)）进行了类似研究，发现颜色出现频率最高的分布相似。除了颜色，我们还看到常见对象如“男人”、“树”和“标志”以及通用视觉元素如“天空”的频繁出现。

items.en: We also study the actual semantic contents of the descriptions. We use an unsupervised approach to analyze the semantics of these descriptions. Specifically, we use word2vec Mikolov et al., (2013) to convert each word in a description to a 300-dimensional vector. Next, we remove stop words and average the remaining words to get a vector representation of the whole region description. This pipeline is outlined in Figure 17. We use hierarchical agglomerative clustering on vector representations of each region description and find 71 semantic and syntactic groupings or “clusters.” Figure 19 (a) shows four such example clusters.
