One cluster contains all descriptions related to tennis, like “A man swings the racquet” and “White lines on the ground of the tennis court,” while another cluster contains descriptions related to numbers, like “Three dogs on the street” and “Two people inside the tent.” To quantitatively measure the diversity of Visual Genome’s region descriptions, we calculate the number of clusters represented in a single image’s region descriptions. We show the distribution of the variety of descriptions for an image in Figure 19 (b). We find that on average, each image contains descriptions from 17 different clusters. The image with the least diverse descriptions contains descriptions from 4 clusters, while the image with the most diverse descriptions contains descriptions from 26 clusters.
items.zh: 我们还研究了描述的实际语义内容。我们使用无监督方法来分析这些描述的语义。具体来说，我们使用word2vec (Mikolov et al., 2013) 将描述中的每个单词转换为300维向量。接下来，我们移除停用词，并对剩余单词取平均，得到整个区域描述的向量表示。该流程如图17所示。我们对每个区域描述的向量表示使用层次凝聚聚类，发现了71个语义和句法分组或“簇”。图19(a)显示了四个这样的示例簇。一个簇包含所有与网球相关的描述，如“一个男人挥动球拍”和“网球场地面上的白线”，而另一个簇包含与数字相关的描述，如“街上的三只狗”和“帐篷里的两个人”。为了定量衡量Visual Genome区域描述的多样性，我们计算了单个图像的区域描述所代表的簇的数量。我们在图19(b)中展示了一幅图像描述多样性的分布。我们发现，平均每幅图像包含来自17个不同簇的描述。多样性最低的图像包含来自4个簇的描述，而多样性最高的图像包含来自26个簇的描述。

items.en: Finally, we also compare the descriptions in Visual Genome to the captions in MS-COCO. First we aggregate all Visual Genome and MS-COCO descriptions and remove all stop words. After removing stop words, the descriptions from both datasets are roughly the same length. We conduct a similar study, in which we vectorize the descriptions for each image and calculate each dataset’s cluster diversity per image. We find that on average, 2 clusters are represented in the captions for each image in MS-COCO, with very few images in which 5 clusters are represented. Because each image in MS-COCO only contains 5 captions, it is not a fair comparison to compare the number of clusters represented in all the region descriptions in the Visual Genome dataset. We thus randomly sample 5 Visual Genome region descriptions per image and calculate the number of clusters in an image. We find that Visual Genome descriptions come from 4 or 5 clusters. We show our comparison results in Figure 19 (c). The difference between the semantic diversity between the two datasets is statistically significant (t=−240𝑡240t=-240, p<0.01𝑝0.01p<0.01).
items.zh: 最后，我们还将Visual Genome中的描述与MS-COCO中的字幕进行了比较。首先，我们汇总所有Visual Genome和MS-COCO的描述，并移除所有停用词。移除停用词后，两个数据集的描述长度大致相同。我们进行了一项类似研究，将每幅图像的描述向量化，并计算每个数据集每幅图像的簇多样性。我们发现，在MS-COCO中，每幅图像的字幕平均代表2个簇，很少有图像代表5个簇。由于MS-COCO中的每幅图像只有5个字幕，因此比较Visual Genome数据集中所有区域描述所代表的簇数量并不公平。因此，我们随机抽取每幅图像的5个Visual Genome区域描述，并计算图像中的簇数量。我们发现Visual Genome描述来自4或5个簇。我们在图19(c)中展示了比较结果。两个数据集之间的语义多样性差异具有统计学显著性（t=-240，p<0.01）。

items.en: In comparison to related datasets, Visual Genome fares well in terms of object density and diversity. Visual Genome contains approximately 212121 objects per image, exceeding ImageNet Deng et al., (2009), PASCAL Everingham et al., (2010), MS-COCO Lin et al., (2014), and other datasets by large margins. As shown in Figure 21, there are more object categories represented in Visual Genome than in any other dataset. This comparison is especially pertinent with regards to Microsoft MS-COCO Lin et al., (2014), which uses the same images as Visual Genome. The lower count of objects per category is a result of our higher number of categories. For a fairer comparison with ILSVRC 2014 Detection Russakovsky et al., (2015), Visual Genome has about 223922392239 objects per category when only the top 200200200 categories are considered, which is comparable to ILSVRC’s 2671.52671.52671.5 objects per category. For a fairer comparison with MS-COCO, Visual Genome has about 376837683768 objects per category when only the top 919191 categories are considered. This is comparable to MS-COCO’s Lin et al., (2014) when we consider just the 108,249108249108,249 MS-COCO images in Visual Genome.
items.zh: 与相关数据集相比，Visual Genome在对象密度和多样性方面表现良好。Visual Genome每幅图像包含约21个对象，远超ImageNet (Deng et al., 2009)、PASCAL (Everingham et al., 2010)、MS-COCO (Lin et al., 2014) 等数据集。如图21所示，Visual Genome中表示的对象类别数量超过任何其他数据集。这一比较尤其与Microsoft MS-COCO (Lin et al., 2014) 相关，后者使用与Visual Genome相同的图像。每个类别对象数量较低是我们类别数量较多的结果。为了与ILSVRC 2014检测任务 (Russakovsky et al., 2015) 进行更公平的比较，当仅考虑前200个类别时，Visual Genome每个类别约有2239个对象，与ILSVRC的每个类别2671.5个对象相当。为了与MS-COCO进行更公平的比较，当仅考虑前91个类别时，Visual Genome每个类别约有3768个对象。这与MS-COCO (Lin et al., 2014) 相当，当我们仅考虑Visual Genome中的108,249张MS-COCO图像时。

items.en: Objects in Visual Genome come from a variety of categories. As shown in Figure 22 (b), objects related to WordNet categories such as humans, animals, sports, and scenery are most common; this is consistent with the general bias in image subject matter in our dataset. Common objects like man, person, and woman occur especially frequently with occurrences of 242424K, 171717K, and 111111K. Other objects that also occur in MS-COCO Lin et al., (2014) are also well represented with around 500050005000 instances on average. Figure 22 (a) shows some examples of objects in images. Objects in Visual Genome span a diverse set of Wordnet categories like food, animals, and man-made structures.
items.zh: Visual Genome中的对象来自多种类别。如图22(b)所示，与WordNet类别（如人类、动物、体育和风景）相关的对象最为常见；这与我们数据集中图像主题的普遍偏差一致。常见对象如男人、人和女人出现频率特别高，分别出现24K、17K和11K次。其他也出现在MS-COCO (Lin et al., 2014) 中的对象也得到很好的表示，平均约有5000个实例。图22(a)显示了图像中对象的一些示例。Visual Genome中的对象涵盖了多种WordNet类别，如食物、动物和人造结构。

items.en: It is important to look not only at what types of objects we have but also at the distribution of objects in images and regions. Figure 20 (a) shows, as expected, that we have between 0 and 2 objects in each region on average. It is possible for regions to contain no objects if their descriptions refer to no explicit objects in the image. For example, a region described as “it is dark outside” has no objects to extract. Regions with only one object generally have descriptions that focus on the attributes of a single object. On the other hand, regions with two or more objects generally have descriptions that contain both attributes of specific objects and relationships between pairs of objects.
items.zh: 不仅要看我们拥有哪些类型的对象，还要看对象在图像和区域中的分布。图20(a)显示，正如预期，每个区域平均有0到2个对象。如果区域的描述没有指向图像中的明确对象，则区域可能不包含对象。例如，描述为“外面很黑”的区域没有可提取的对象。只有一个对象的区域通常描述集中在单个对象的属性上。另一方面，有两个或更多对象的区域通常描述包含特定对象的属性以及对象对之间的关系。

items.en: As shown in Figure 20 (b), each image contains on average around 212121 unique objects. Few images have a low number of objects, which we expect since images usually capture more than a few objects. Moreover, few images have an extremely high number of objects (e.g. over 404040).
items.zh: 如图20(b)所示，每幅图像平均包含约21个唯一对象。很少有图像的对象数量较少，我们预计这是因为图像通常捕获不止几个对象。此外，很少有图像的对象数量极高（例如超过40个）。

items.capEn: Figure 21: Comparison of object diversity between various datasets. Visual Genome far surpasses other datasets in terms of number of object categories.
items.capZh: 图21：不同数据集之间对象多样性的比较。Visual Genome在对象类别数量上远超其他数据集。

items.en: Attributes allow for detailed description and disambiguation of objects in our dataset. About 45%percent4545\% of objects in Visual Genome are annotated with at least one attribute; our dataset contains 1.61.61.6 million total attributes with 13,0411304113,041 unique attributes. Attributes include colors (green), sizes (tall), continuous action verbs (standing), materials (plastic), etc. Each attribute in our scene graphs belongs to one object, while each object can have multiple attributes. We denote attributes as attribute(object).
items.zh: 属性允许对数据集中的对象进行详细描述和消歧。Visual Genome中约45%的对象至少标注了一个属性；我们的数据集包含160万个属性，共13,041个唯一属性。属性包括颜色（绿色）、大小（高）、持续动作动词（站立）、材料（塑料）等。场景图中的每个属性属于一个对象，而每个对象可以有多个属性。我们将属性表示为attribute(object)。

items.en: On average, each image in Visual Genome contains 212121 attributes, as shown in Figure 23. Each region contains on average 111 attribute, though about 42%percent4242\% of regions contain no attribute at all; this is primarily because many regions are relationship-focused. Figure 24 (a) shows the distribution of the most common attributes in our dataset. Colors (e.g. white, green) are by far the most frequent attributes. Also common are sizes (e.g. large) and materials (e.g. wooden). Figure 24 (b) shows the distribution of attributes describing people (e.g. man, girls, and person). The most common attributes describing people are intransitive verbs describing their states of motion (e.g.standing and walking). Certain sports (skiing, surfboarding) are overrepresented due to a bias towards these sports in our images.
items.zh: 平均而言，Visual Genome中的每幅图像包含21个属性，如图23所示。每个区域平均包含1个属性，尽管约42%的区域不包含任何属性；这主要是因为许多区域侧重于关系。图24(a)显示了数据集中最常见属性的分布。颜色（如白色、绿色）是最频繁的属性。大小（如大）和材料（如木质）也很常见。图24(b)显示了描述人物（如男人、女孩和人）的属性的分布。描述人物最常见的属性是描述其运动状态的不及物动词（如站立和行走）。某些运动（滑雪、冲浪）由于图像中偏向这些运动而过度呈现。

items.en: We also qualitatively analyze the attributes in our dataset by constructing co-occurrence graphs, in which nodes are unique attributes and edges connect those attributes that describe the same object. For example, if an image contained a “large black dog” (large(dog), black(dog)) and another image contained a “large yellow cat” (large(cat), yellow(cat)), its attributes would form an incomplete graph with edges (large, black) and (large, yellow). We create two such graphs: one for both the total set of attributes and a second where we consider only objects that refer to people. A subgraph of the 16 most frequently connected (co-occurring) person-related attributes is shown in Figure 25 (a).
items.zh: 我们还通过构建共现图来定性分析数据集中的属性，其中节点是唯一属性，边连接描述同一对象的那些属性。例如，如果一张图像包含“大黑狗”（大(狗)，黑(狗)），另一张图像包含“大黄猫”（大(猫)，黄(猫)），则其属性将形成一个不完整的图，边为（大，黑）和（大，黄）。我们创建了两个这样的图：一个针对所有属性集合，另一个仅考虑涉及人的对象。图25（a）显示了16个最常连接（共现）的人相关属性的子图。

items.en: Cliques in these graphs represent groups of attributes in which at least one co-occurrence exists for each pair of attributes in that group. In the previous example, if a third image contained a “black and yellow taxi” (black(taxi), yellow(taxi)), the resulting third edge would create a clique between the attributes black, large, and yellow. When calculated across the entire Visual Genome dataset, these cliques provide insight into commonly perceived traits of different types of objects. Figure 25 (b) is a selected representation of three example cliques and their overlaps. From just a clique of attributes, we can predict what types of objects are usually referenced. In Figure 25 (b), we see that these cliques describe an animal (left), water body (top right), and human hair (bottom right).
items.zh: 这些图中的团表示属性组，其中该组中每对属性至少存在一次共现。在前面的例子中，如果第三张图像包含“黑黄出租车”（黑(出租车)，黄(出租车)），则产生的第三条边将在属性黑、大和黄之间形成一个团。当在整个Visual Genome数据集上计算时，这些团提供了对不同类型对象常见特征的洞察。图25（b）是三个示例团及其重叠的选择性表示。仅从一个属性团，我们就可以预测通常引用的对象类型。在图25（b）中，我们看到这些团描述了一个动物（左）、水体（右上）和人类头发（右下）。

items.en: Other cliques (not shown) can also uniquely identify objects. In our set, one clique contains athletic, young, fit, skateboarding, focused, teenager, male, skinny, and happy, capturing some of the common traits of skateboarders in our set. Another such clique has shiny, small, metal, silver, rusty, parked, and empty, most likely describing a subset of cars. From these cliques, we can thus infer distinct objects and object types based solely on their attributes, potentially allowing for highly specific object identification based on selected characteristics.
items.zh: 其他团（未显示）也可以唯一标识对象。在我们的集合中，一个团包含运动、年轻、健康、滑板、专注、青少年、男性、瘦和快乐，捕捉了我们集合中滑板者的一些常见特征。另一个这样的团有闪亮、小、金属、银色、生锈、停放和空，很可能描述了一部分汽车。从这些团中，我们可以仅根据属性推断出不同的对象和对象类型，从而可能基于选定的特征进行高度特定的对象识别。

items.en: Relationships are the core components that link objects in our scene graphs. Relationships are directional, i.e. they involve two objects, one acting as the subject and one as the object of a predicate relationship. We denote all relationships in the form relationship(subject, object). For example, if a man is swinging a bat, we write swinging(man, bat). Relationships can be spatial (e.g. inside_of), action (e.g. swinging), compositional (e.g. part_of), etc. More complex relationships such as standing_on, which includes both an action and a spatial aspect, are also represented. Relationships are extracted from region descriptions by crowd workers, similarly to attributes and objects. Visual Genome contains a total of 13,8941389413,894 unique relationships, with over 1.81.81.8 million total relationships.
items.zh: 关系是连接场景图中对象的核心组件。关系是有方向的，即它们涉及两个对象，一个作为主语，一个作为谓语关系的宾语。我们以关系（主语，宾语）的形式表示所有关系。例如，如果一个男人在挥动球棒，我们写为挥动（男人，球棒）。关系可以是空间的（例如，在...内部）、动作的（例如，挥动）、组成的（例如，...的一部分）等。更复杂的关系，如站在...上，同时包含动作和空间方面，也被表示。关系由众包工作者从区域描述中提取，类似于属性和对象。Visual Genome总共包含13,894个唯一关系，总关系数超过180万。

items.en: We display the most frequently occurring relationships in Figure 27 (a). on is the most common relationship in our dataset. This is primarily because of the flexibility of the word on, which can refer to spatial configuration (on top of), attachment (hanging on), etc. Other common relationships involve actions like holding and wearing and spatial configurations like behind, next to, and under. Figure 27 (b) shows a similar distribution but for relationships involving people. Here we notice more human-centric relationships or actions such as kissing, chatting with, and talking to. The two distributions follow a Zipf distribution”.
items.zh: 我们在图27（a）中展示了最常出现的关系。在数据集中，在...上是常见的关系。这主要是因为单词“在...上”的灵活性，它可以指空间配置（在...顶部）、附着（挂在...上）等。其他常见关系涉及动作，如拿着和穿着，以及空间配置，如在...后面、在...旁边和在...下面。图27（b）显示了类似分布，但针对涉及人的关系。这里我们注意到更多以人为中心的关系或动作，如亲吻、与...聊天和与...交谈。这两个分布遵循齐普夫分布。

items.en: Relationships allow us to also understand the affordances of objects. We show this using a specific distribution of subjects and objects involved in the relationship riding in Figure 28. Figure 28 (a) shows the distribution for subjects while Figure 28 (b) shows a similar distribution for objects. Comparing the two distributions, we find clear patterns of people-like subject entities such as person, man, policeman, boy, and skateboarder that can ride other objects; the other distribution contains objects that afford riding, such as horse, bike, elephant, motorcycle, and skateboard. We can also learn specific common-sense knowledge, like that skateboarders only ride skateboards and only surfers ride waves or surfboards.
items.zh: 关系还使我们能够理解对象的可供性。我们通过图28中涉及骑乘关系的主语和宾语的特定分布来展示这一点。图28（a）显示了主语的分布，而图28（b）显示了宾语的类似分布。比较这两个分布，我们发现了清晰的模式：类似人的主语实体，如人、男人、警察、男孩和滑板者，可以骑乘其他对象；另一个分布包含可供骑乘的对象，如马、自行车、大象、摩托车和滑板。我们还可以学习特定的常识知识，例如滑板者只骑滑板，只有冲浪者骑浪或冲浪板。

items.en: It is also worth mentioning in this section some prior work on relationships. The concept of visual relationships has already been explored in Visual Phrases Sadeghi and Farhadi, (2011), who introduced a dataset of 171717 such relationships such as next_to(person, bike) and riding(person, horse). However, their dataset is limited to just these 171717 relationships. Similarly, the MS-COCO-a dataset Ruggero Ronchi and Perona, (2015) introduced 140140140 actions that humans performed in MS-COCO’s dataset Lin et al., (2014). However, their dataset is limited to just actions, while our relationships are more general and numerous, with over 131313K unique relationships. Finally, VisKE Sadeghi et al., (2015) introduced 650065006500 relationships, but in a much smaller dataset of images than Visual Genome.
items.zh: 在本节中，还值得提及一些关于关系的先前工作。视觉关系的概念已经在Visual Phrases Sadeghi和Farhadi（2011）中探索过，他们引入了一个包含17个关系的数据集，例如next_to（人，自行车）和riding（人，马）。然而，他们的数据集仅限于这17个关系。类似地，MS-COCO-a数据集Ruggero Ronchi和Perona（2015）引入了MS-COCO数据集Lin等人（2014）中人类执行的140个动作。然而，他们的数据集仅限于动作，而我们的关系更通用且数量更多，拥有超过13,000个唯一关系。最后，VisKE Sadeghi等人（2015）引入了6,500个关系，但图像数据集比Visual Genome小得多。

items.capEn: Figure 29: Example QA pairs in the Visual Genome dataset. Our QA pairs cover a spectrum of visual tasks from recognition to high-level reasoning.
items.capZh: 图29：Visual Genome数据集中的示例问答对。我们的问答对涵盖了从识别到高级推理的多种视觉任务。

items.en: We introduce in this paper the largest dataset of scene graphs to date. We use these graph representations of images as a deeper understanding of the visual world. In this section, we analyze the properties of these representations, both at the region level through region graphs and at the image level through scene graphs. We also briefly explore other datasets with scene graphs and provide aggregate statistics on our entire dataset.
items.zh: 本文介绍了迄今为止最大的场景图数据集。我们利用这些图像的图表示作为对视觉世界的更深层次理解。在本节中，我们分析了这些表示的特性，既包括区域级别的区域图，也包括图像级别的场景图。我们还简要探讨了其他带有场景图的数据集，并提供了整个数据集的汇总统计。

items.en: Scene graphs by asking humans to write triples about an image Johnson et al., (2015). However, unlike them, we collect graphs at a much more fine-grained level, the region graph. We obtained our graphs by asking workers to create them from the descriptions we collected from our regions. Therefore, we end up with multiple graphs for an image, one for every region description. Together, we can combine all the individual region graphs to aggregate a scene graph for an image. This scene graph is made up of all the individual region graphs. In our scene graph representation, we merge all the objects that referenced by multiple region graphs into one node in the scene graph.
items.zh: 场景图通过要求人类为图像编写三元组来构建（Johnson等人，2015）。然而，与他们不同，我们在更细粒度的层面（区域图）收集图。我们通过要求工作人员根据从区域收集的描述来创建图。因此，我们最终为每张图像得到多个图，每个区域描述对应一个图。我们可以将所有单独的区域图合并起来，为图像聚合出一个场景图。这个场景图由所有单独的区域图组成。在我们的场景图表示中，我们将多个区域图引用的所有对象合并为场景图中的一个节点。

items.en: Each of our images has a distribution between 404040 to 505050 region graphs per image, with an average of 424242. Each image has exactly one scene graph. Note that the number of region descriptions and the number of region graphs for an image are not the same. For example, consider the description “it is a sunny day”. Such a description contains no objects, which are the building blocks of a region graph. Therefore, such descriptions have no region graphs associated with them.
items.zh: 我们的每张图像有40到50个区域图，平均42个。每张图像恰好有一个场景图。请注意，区域描述的数量和区域图的数量并不相同。例如，考虑描述“这是一个晴天”。这样的描述不包含对象，而对象是区域图的构建块。因此，这样的描述没有关联的区域图。

items.en: Objects, attributes, and relationships occur as a normal distribution in our data. Table 4 shows that in a region graph, there are an average of 0.430.430.43 objects, 0.410.410.41 attributes, and 0.450.450.45 relationships. Each scene graph and consequently each image has average of 21.2621.2621.26 objects, 16.2116.2116.21 attributes, and 18.6718.6718.67 relationships.
items.zh: 对象、属性和关系在我们的数据中呈正态分布。表4显示，在一个区域图中，平均有0.43个对象、0.41个属性和0.45个关系。每个场景图（因此每张图像）平均有21.26个对象、16.21个属性和18.67个关系。

items.en: We collected 1,773,25817732581,773,258 question answering (QA) pairs on the Visual Genome images. Each pair consists of a question and its correct answer regarding the content of an image. On average, every image has 171717 QA pairs. Rather than collecting unconstrained QA pairs as previous work has done Antol et al., (2015); Gao et al., (2015); Malinowski and Fritz, (2014), each question in Visual Genome starts with one of the six Ws – what, where, when, who, why, and how. There are two major benefits to focusing on six types of questions. First, they offer a considerable coverage of question types, ranging from basic perceptual tasks (e.g. recognizing objects and scenes) to complex common sense reasoning (e.g. inferring motivations of people and causality of events). Second, these categories present a natural and consistent stratification of task difficulty, indicated by the baseline performance in Section 6.4. For instance, why questions that involve complex reasoning lead to the poorest performance (3.4%percent3.43.4\% top-100 accuracy) of the six categories. This enables us to obtain a better understanding of the strengths and weaknesses of today’s computer vision models, which sheds light on future directions in which to proceed.
items.zh: 我们在Visual Genome图像上收集了1,773,258个问答对。每个问答对包含一个关于图像内容的问题及其正确答案。平均每张图像有17个问答对。与之前工作收集的无约束问答对不同（Antol等人，2015；Gao等人，2015；Malinowski和Fritz，2014），Visual Genome中的每个问题都以六个W之一开头——什么、哪里、何时、谁、为什么和如何。专注于这六类问题有两个主要好处。首先，它们涵盖了广泛的问题类型，从基本的感知任务（例如识别对象和场景）到复杂的常识推理（例如推断人的动机和事件的因果关系）。其次，这些类别提供了自然且一致的任务难度分层，如第6.4节的基线性能所示。例如，涉及复杂推理的“为什么”问题在六类中表现最差（top-100准确率3.4%）。这使我们能够更好地理解当前计算机视觉模型的优缺点，从而为未来的发展方向提供启示。

items.en: We now analyze the diversity and quality of our questions and answers. Our goal is to construct a large-scale visual question answering dataset that covers a diverse range of question types, from basic cognition tasks to complex reasoning tasks. We demonstrate the richness and diversity of our QA pairs by examining the distributions of questions and answers in Figure 29.
items.zh: 我们现在分析问题和答案的多样性和质量。我们的目标是构建一个大规模视觉问答数据集，涵盖从基本认知任务到复杂推理任务的多种问题类型。我们通过检查图29中问题和答案的分布来展示问答对的丰富性和多样性。

items.en: The questions naturally fall into the 6W categories via their interrogative words. Inside each of the categories, the second and following words categorize the questions with increasing granularity. Inspired by VQA Antol et al., (2015), we show the distributions of the questions by their first three words in Figure 30. We can see that “what” is the most common of the six categories. A notable difference between our question distribution and VQA’s is that we focus on ensuring that all 7 question categories are adequately represented, while in VQA, 32.37%percent32.3732.37\% of the questions are yes/no binary questions. As a result, a trivial model can achieve a reasonable performance by just predicting “yes” or “no” as answers. We encourage more difficult QA pairs by ruling out binary questions.
items.zh: 问题通过其疑问词自然地分为6W类别。在每个类别内部，第二个及后续词以越来越细的粒度对问题进行分类。受VQA（Antol等人，2015）启发，我们在图30中展示了按前三个词分类的问题分布。我们可以看到，“什么”是六类中最常见的。我们的问题分布与VQA的一个显著区别是，我们专注于确保所有7个问题类别都得到充分代表，而在VQA中，32.37%的问题是是/否二元问题。因此，一个简单的模型只需预测“是”或“否”作为答案就能获得合理的性能。我们通过排除二元问题来鼓励更难的问答对。

items.capEn: Figure 30: Distribution of question types by starting words. This figure shows the distribution of the questions by their first three words. The angles of the regions are proportional to the number of pairs from the corresponding categories. We can see that “what” questions are the largest category with nearly half of the QA pairs.
items.capZh: 图30：按起始词划分的问题类型分布。该图显示了按前三个词分类的问题分布。区域的角与对应类别的问答对数量成正比。我们可以看到，“什么”问题是最大的类别，占问答对近一半。

items.en: We also analyze the question and answer lengths of each 6W category. Figure 31 shows the average question and answer lengths of each category. Overall, the average question and answer lengths are 5.7 and 1.8 words respectively. In contrast to the VQA dataset, where .88%percent.88.88\%, 8.38%percent8.388.38\%, and 3.25%percent3.253.25\% of the answers consist of one, two, or three words, our answers exhibit a long-tail distribution where 57.3%percent57.357.3\%, 18.1%percent18.118.1\%, and 15.7%percent15.715.7\% of the answers have one, two, or three words respectively. We avoid verbosity by instructing the workers to write answers as concisely as possible. The coverage of long answers means that many answers contain a short description that contains more details than merely an object or an attribute. It shows the richness and complexity of our visual QA tasks beyond object-centric recognition tasks. We foresee that these long-tail questions can motivate future research in common-sense reasoning and high-level image understanding.
items.zh: 我们还分析了每个6W类别的问题和答案长度。图31显示了每个类别的平均问题和答案长度。总体而言，平均问题和答案长度分别为5.7和1.8个词。与VQA数据集（其中0.88%、8.38%和3.25%的答案分别由一个、两个或三个词组成）相比，我们的答案呈现长尾分布，其中57.3%、18.1%和15.7%的答案分别由一个、两个或三个词组成。我们通过指示工作人员尽可能简洁地编写答案来避免冗长。长答案的覆盖意味着许多答案包含简短的描述，其中包含比仅仅一个对象或属性更多的细节。这表明我们的视觉问答任务超越了以对象为中心的识别任务，具有丰富性和复杂性。我们预见这些长尾问题将激发未来在常识推理和高级图像理解方面的研究。

items.capEn: Figure 31: Question and answer lengths by question type. The bars show the average question and answer lengths of each question type. The whiskers show the standard deviations. The factual questions, such as “what” and “how” questions, usually come with short answers of a single object or a number. This is only because “how” questions are disproportionately counting questions that start with “how many”. Questions from the “where” and “why” categories usually have phrases and sentences as answers.
items.capZh: 图31：按问题类型划分的问题和答案长度。条形图显示了每种问题类型的平均问题和答案长度。须状线表示标准差。事实性问题，如“什么”和“如何”问题，通常有简短的回答，如单个对象或数字。这只是因为“如何”问题不成比例地是计数问题，以“多少”开头。“哪里”和“为什么”类别的问题通常以短语和句子作为答案。

items.capEn: Figure 32: An example image from the Visual Genome dataset with its region descriptions, QA, objects, attributes, and relationships canonicalized. The large text boxes are WordNet synsets referenced by this image. For example, the carriage is mapped to carriage.n.02: a vehicle with wheels drawn by one or more horses. We do not show the bounding boxes for the objects in order to allow readers to see the image clearly. We also only show a subset of the scene graph for this image to avoid cluttering the figure.
items.capZh: 图32：Visual Genome数据集中的示例图像，包含其区域描述、问答对、对象、属性和关系的规范化。大文本框是此图像引用的WordNet同义词集。例如，马车映射到carriage.n.02：由一匹或多匹马牵引的带轮车辆。为了清晰显示图像，我们未显示对象的边界框。我们还仅显示了此图像场景图的一个子集，以避免图形混乱。

items.en: In order to reduce the ambiguity in the concepts of our dataset and connect it to other resources used by the research community, we canonicalize the semantic meanings of all objects, relationships, and attributes in Visual Genome. By “canonicalization,” we refer to word sense disambiguation (WSD) by mapping the components in our dataset to their respective synsets in the WordNet ontology Miller, (1995). This mapping reduces the noise in the concepts contained in the dataset and also facilitates the linkage between Visual Genome and other data sources such as ImageNet Deng et al., (2009), which is built on top of the WordNet ontology.
items.zh: 为了减少数据集中概念的歧义，并将其与研究社区使用的其他资源连接起来，我们对Visual Genome中所有对象、关系和属性的语义含义进行规范化。所谓“规范化”，我们指的是通过将数据集中的组件映射到WordNet本体（Miller，1995）中各自的同义词集来进行词义消歧。这种映射减少了数据集中概念的噪声，并促进了Visual Genome与其他数据源（如基于WordNet本体的ImageNet（Deng等人，2009））之间的链接。

items.en: Canonicalization, or WSD Pal and Saha, (2015), has been used in numerous applications, including machine translation, information retrieval, and information extraction Rothe and Schütze, (2015); Leacock et al., (1998). In English sentences, sentences like “He scored a goal” and “It was his goal in life” carry different meanings for the word “goal.” Understanding these differences is crucial for translating languages and for returning correct results for a query. Similarly, in Visual Genome, we ensure that all our components are canonicalized to understand how different objects are related to each other; for example, “person” is a hypernym of “man” and “woman.” Most past canonicalization models use precision, recall, and F1 score to evaluate on the Semeval dataset Mihalcea et al., (2004). The current state-of-the-art performance on Semeval is an F1 score of 75.8%percent75.875.8\% Chen et al., (2014). Since our canonicalization setup is different from the Semeval benchmark (we have an open vocabulary and no annotated ground truth for evaluation), our canonicalization method is not directly comparable to these existing methods. We do however, achieve a similar precision and recall score on a held-out test set described below.
items.zh: 规范化，或称词义消歧（Pal和Saha，2015），已用于众多应用，包括机器翻译、信息检索和信息抽取（Rothe和Schütze，2015；Leacock等人，1998）。在英语句子中，像“He scored a goal”和“It was his goal in life”这样的句子对单词“goal”有不同的含义。理解这些差异对于翻译语言和返回正确的查询结果至关重要。同样，在Visual Genome中，我们确保所有组件都经过规范化，以理解不同对象之间的关系；例如，“person”是“man”和“woman”的上位词。大多数过去的规范化模型使用精确率、召回率和F1分数在Semeval数据集（Mihalcea等人，2004）上进行评估。当前Semeval上的最先进性能是F1分数75.8%（Chen等人，2014）。由于我们的规范化设置与Semeval基准不同（我们有开放词汇且没有用于评估的标注真实值），我们的规范化方法不能直接与这些现有方法比较。然而，我们在下面描述的保留测试集上确实达到了类似的精确率和召回率分数。

items.en: We canonicalize all objects mentioned in all region descriptions and QA pairs. Because objects need to be extracted from the phrase text, we use Stanford NLP tools Manning et al., (2014) to extract the noun phrases in each region description and QA, resulting in 99%percent9999\% recall of noun phrases from a subset of 200200200 region descriptions we manually annotated. After obtaining the noun phrases, we map each to its most frequent matching synset (according to WordNet lexeme counts). This resulted in an overall mapping accuracy of 86%percent8686\% and a recall of 98.5%percent98.598.5\%. The most common synsets extracted from region descriptions, QAs, and objects are shown in Figure 33.
items.zh: 我们对所有区域描述和问答对中提到的所有对象进行规范化。由于需要从短语文本中提取对象，我们使用Stanford NLP工具（Manning等人，2014）提取每个区域描述和问答对中的名词短语，从我们手动标注的200个区域描述子集中实现了99%的名词短语召回率。获得名词短语后，我们将每个映射到其最频繁匹配的同义词集（根据WordNet词条计数）。这导致了整体映射准确率86%和召回率98.5%。从区域描述、问答对和对象中提取的最常见同义词集如图33所示。

items.en: We canonicalize attributes from the crowd-extracted attributes present in our scene graphs. The “attribute” designation encompasses a wide range of grammatical parts of speech. Because part-of-speech taggers rely on high-level syntax information and thus fail on the disjoint elements of our scene graphs, we normalize each attribute based on morphology alone (so-called “stemming”). Then, as with objects, we map each attribute phrase to the most frequent matching WordNet synset. We include 15 hand-mapped rules to address common failure cases in which WordNet’s frequency counts prefer abstract senses of words over the spatial senses present in visual data, e.g. “short.a.01: limited in duration” over short.a.02: lacking in length. For verification, we randomly sample 200200200 attributes, produce ground-truth mappings by hand, and compare them to the results of our algorithm. This resulted in a recall of 95.9%percent95.995.9\% and a mapping accuracy of 83.5%percent83.583.5\%. The most common attribute synsets are shown in Figure 34 (a).
items.zh: 我们对场景图中来自众包提取的属性进行规范化。“属性”指定涵盖了广泛的语法词性。由于词性标注器依赖于高级句法信息，因此在场景图的离散元素上失败，我们仅基于形态学对每个属性进行归一化（所谓的“词干提取”）。然后，与对象一样，我们将每个属性短语映射到最频繁匹配的WordNet同义词集。我们包含了15条手工映射规则，以解决常见失败情况，其中WordNet的频率计数偏好抽象的词语含义而非视觉数据中存在的空间含义，例如“short.a.01：持续时间有限”优先于“short.a.02：长度不足”。为了验证，我们随机抽样200个属性，手工生成真实映射，并与算法结果进行比较。这导致了召回率95.9%和映射准确率83.5%。最常见的属性同义词集如图34(a)所示。

items.en: As with attributes, we canonicalize the relationships isolated in our scene graphs. We exclude prepositions, which are not recognized in WordNet, leaving a set primarily composed of verb relationships. Since the meanings of verbs are highly dependent upon their morphology and syntactic placement (e.g. passive cases, prepositional phrases), we map the structure of each relationship to the appropriate WordNet sentence frame and only consider those WordNet synsets with matching sentence frames. For each verb-synset pair, we then consider the root hypernym of that synset to reduce potential noise from WordNet’s fine-grained sense distinctions. We also include 20 hand-mapped rules, again to correct for WordNet’s lower representation of concrete or spatial senses; for example, the concrete hold.v.02: have or hold in one’s hand or grip is less frequent in WordNet than the abstract hold.v.01: cause to continue in a certain state. For verification, we again randomly sample 200200200 relationships and compare the results of our canonicalization against ground-truth mappings. This resulted in a recall of 88.5%percent88.588.5\% and a mapping accuracy of 77.6%percent77.677.6\%. While several datasets, such as VerbNet Schuler, (2005) and FrameNet Baker et al., (1998), include semantic restrictions or frames to improve classification, there is no comprehensive method of mapping to those restrictions or frames. The most common relationship synsets are shown in Figure 34 (b).
items.zh: 与属性类似，我们对场景图中孤立的关系进行规范化。我们排除了介词，这些在WordNet中不被识别，剩下主要由动词关系组成的集合。由于动词的含义高度依赖于其形态和句法位置（例如被动语态、介词短语），我们将每个关系的结构映射到适当的WordNet句子框架，并仅考虑那些具有匹配句子框架的WordNet同义词集。对于每个动词-同义词集对，我们然后考虑该同义词集的根上位词，以减少WordNet细粒度意义区分带来的潜在噪声。我们还包含了20条手工映射规则，再次纠正WordNet对具体或空间含义的较低表示；例如，具体的hold.v.02：用手或抓握持有或握住，在WordNet中不如抽象的hold.v.01：导致继续处于某种状态常见。为了验证，我们再次随机抽样200个关系，并将规范化结果与真实映射进行比较。这导致了召回率88.5%和映射准确率77.6%。虽然一些数据集，如VerbNet（Schuler，2005）和FrameNet（Baker等人，1998），包含语义限制或框架以改进分类，但没有全面的方法映射到这些限制或框架。最常见的关系同义词集如图34(b)所示。

items.en: Thus far, we have presented the Visual Genome dataset and analyzed its individual components. With such rich information provided, numerous perceptual and cognitive tasks can be tackled. In this section, we aim to provide baseline experimental results using components of Visual Genome that have not been extensively studied. Object detection is already a well-studied problem Everingham et al., (2010); Girshick et al., (2014); Sermanet et al., (2013); Girshick, (2015); Ren et al., 2015b . Similarly, region graphs and scene graphs have been shown to improve semantic image retrieval Johnson et al., (2015); Schuster et al., (2015). We therefore focus on the remaining components, i.e. attributes, relationships, region descriptions, and question answer pairs.
items.zh: 到目前为止，我们已经介绍了Visual Genome数据集并分析了其各个组成部分。凭借如此丰富的信息，可以解决许多感知和认知任务。在本节中，我们旨在使用Visual Genome中尚未被广泛研究的组成部分提供基线实验结果。目标检测已经是一个研究充分的问题（Everingham等人，2010；Girshick等人，2014；Sermanet等人，2013；Girshick，2015；Ren等人，2015b）。类似地，区域图和场景图已被证明可以改善语义图像检索（Johnson等人，2015；Schuster等人，2015）。因此，我们专注于其余组成部分，即属性、关系、区域描述和问答对。

items.en: In Section 6.1, we present results for two experiments on attribute prediction. In the first, we treat attributes independently from objects and train a classifier for each attribute, i.e. a classifier for red or a classifier for old, as in Malisiewicz et al., (2008); Varma and Zisserman, (2005); Ferrari and Zisserman, (2007); Farhadi et al., (2009); Johnson et al., (2015). In the second experiment, we learn object and attribute classifiers jointly and predict object-attribute pairs (e.g. predicting that an apple is red), as in Sadeghi and Farhadi, (2011).
items.zh: 在第6.1节中，我们展示了两个属性预测实验的结果。在第一个实验中，我们将属性与对象独立对待，并为每个属性训练一个分类器，例如为红色训练一个分类器，或为旧的训练一个分类器，如Malisiewicz等人（2008）；Varma和Zisserman（2005）；Ferrari和Zisserman（2007）；Farhadi等人（2009）；Johnson等人（2015）所述。在第二个实验中，我们联合学习对象和属性分类器，并预测对象-属性对（例如，预测苹果是红色的），如Sadeghi和Farhadi（2011）所述。

items.en: In Section 6.2, we present two experiments on relationship prediction. In the first, we aim to predict the predicate between two objects, e.g. predicting the predicate kicking or wearing between two objects. This experiment is synonymous with existing work in action recognition Gupta et al., (2009); Ramanathan et al., (2015). In another experiment, we study relationships by classifying jointly the objects and the predicate (e.g. predicting kicking(man, ball)); we show that this is a very difficult task due to the high variability in the appearance of a relationship (e.g. the ball might be on the ground or in mid-air above the man). These experiment are generalizations of tasks that study spatial relationships between objects and ones that jointly reason about the interaction of humans with objects Yao and Fei-Fei, (2010); Prest et al., (2012).
items.zh: 在第6.2节中，我们展示了两个关系预测实验。在第一个实验中，我们旨在预测两个对象之间的谓词，例如预测两个对象之间的谓词“踢”或“穿”。该实验与现有动作识别工作（Gupta等人，2009；Ramanathan等人，2015）类似。在另一个实验中，我们通过联合分类对象和谓词来研究关系（例如，预测“踢（男人，球）”）；我们表明这是一个非常困难的任务，因为关系外观的高度变异性（例如，球可能在地上或男人上方的空中）。这些实验是研究对象之间空间关系以及联合推理人与对象交互的任务的推广（Yao和Fei-Fei，2010；Prest等人，2012）。

items.en: In Section 6.3 we present results for region captioning. This task is closely related to image captioning Chen et al., (2015); however, results from the two are not directly comparable, as region descriptions are short, incomplete sentences. We train one of the top 16 state-of-the-art image caption generator Karpathy and Fei-Fei, (2014) on (1) our dataset to generate region descriptions and on (2) Flickr30K Young et al., (2014) to generate sentence descriptions. To compare results between the two training approaches, we use simple templates to convert region descriptions into complete sentences. For a more robust evaluation, we validate the descriptions we generate using human judgment.
items.zh: 在第6.3节中，我们展示了区域描述的结果。该任务与图像描述密切相关（Chen等人，2015）；然而，两者的结果不能直接比较，因为区域描述是简短、不完整的句子。我们训练了一个最先进的图像描述生成器（Karpathy和Fei-Fei，2014）的16个顶级模型之一，在（1）我们的数据集上生成区域描述，以及在（2）Flickr30K（Young等人，2014）上生成句子描述。为了比较两种训练方法的结果，我们使用简单的模板将区域描述转换为完整句子。为了更稳健的评估，我们通过人工判断验证生成的描述。

items.en: Finally, in Section 6.4, we experiment on visual question answering, i.e. given an image and a question, we attempt to provide an answer for the question. We report results on the retrieval of the correct answer from a list of existing answers.
items.zh: 最后，在第6.4节中，我们进行了视觉问答实验，即给定一张图像和一个问题，我们尝试为问题提供答案。我们报告了从现有答案列表中检索正确答案的结果。

items.en: Attributes are becoming increasingly important in the field of computer vision, as they offer higher-level semantic cues for various problems and lead to a deeper understanding of images. We can express a wide variety of properties through attributes, such as form (sliced), function (decorative), sentiment (angry), and even intention (helping). Distinguishing between similar objects Isola et al., (2015) leads to finer-grained classification, while describing a previously unseen class through attributes shared with known classes can enable “zero-shot” learning Farhadi et al., (2009); Lampert et al., (2009). Visual Genome is the largest dataset of attributes, with 181818 attributes per image for a total of 1.81.81.8 million attributes.
items.zh: 属性在计算机视觉领域变得越来越重要，因为它们为各种问题提供了更高层次的语义线索，并导致对图像的更深入理解。我们可以通过属性表达多种性质，例如形式（切片）、功能（装饰）、情感（愤怒）甚至意图（帮助）。区分相似对象（Isola等人，2015）导致更细粒度的分类，而通过与已知类共享的属性描述以前未见过的类可以实现“零样本”学习（Farhadi等人，2009；Lampert等人，2009）。Visual Genome是最大的属性数据集，每张图像有18个属性，总共180万个属性。

items.en: For both experiments, we focus on the 100100100 most common attributes in our dataset. We only use objects that occur at least 100100100 times and are associated with one of the 100100100 attributes in at least one image. For both experiments, we follow a similar data pre-processing pipeline. First, we lowercase, lemmatize, and strip excess whitespace from all attributes. Since the number of examples per attribute class varies, we randomly sample 500500500 attributes from each category (if fewer than 500500500 are in the class, we take all of them).
items.zh: 对于这两个实验，我们关注数据集中最常见的100个属性。我们只使用出现至少100次且至少在一张图像中与这100个属性之一关联的对象。对于这两个实验，我们遵循类似的数据预处理流程。首先，我们将所有属性转换为小写、词形还原并去除多余空格。由于每个属性类别的样本数量不同，我们从每个类别中随机抽取500个属性（如果类别中少于500个，则取全部）。

items.en: We end up with around 50,0005000050,000 attribute instances and 43,0004300043,000 object-attribute pair instances in total. We use 80%percent8080\% of the images for training and 10%percent1010\% each for validation and testing. Because each image has about the same number of examples, this results in an approximately 80%percent8080\%-10%percent1010\%-10%percent1010\% split over the attributes themselves. The input data for this experiment is the cropped bounding box of the object associated with each attribute.
items.zh: 我们最终得到大约50,000个属性实例和43,000个对象-属性对实例。我们使用80%的图像进行训练，各10%用于验证和测试。由于每张图像具有大致相同数量的示例，这导致属性本身大约80%-10%-10%的分割。该实验的输入数据是与每个属性关联的对象的裁剪边界框。

items.en: We train an attribute predictor by using features learned from a convolutional neural network. Specifically, we fine-tune a 16-layer VGG network Simonyan and Zisserman, (2014) for both of these experiments using the 50,0005000050,000 attribute and 43,0004300043,000 object-attribute pair instances respectively. We modify the network so that the learning rate of the final fully-connected layer is 10 times that of the other layers, as this improves convergence time. We use a base learning rate of 0.001, which we scale by 0.1 every 200200200 iterations, and momentum and weight decays of 0.90.90.9 and 0.00050.00050.0005 respectively. We use the fine-tuned features from the network and train 100100100 individual SVMs Hearst et al., (1998) to predict each attribute. We output multiple attributes for each bounding box input. For the second experiment, we also output the object class.
items.zh: 我们通过使用卷积神经网络学习的特征来训练属性预测器。具体来说，我们分别使用50,000个属性和43,000个对象-属性对实例，对16层VGG网络（Simonyan和Zisserman，2014）进行微调。我们修改网络，使最后一个全连接层的学习率是其他层的10倍，因为这可以改善收敛时间。我们使用0.001的基础学习率，每200次迭代缩放0.1倍，动量和权重衰减分别为0.9和0.0005。我们使用微调后的特征，并训练100个独立的SVM（Hearst等人，1998）来预测每个属性。我们为每个边界框输入输出多个属性。对于第二个实验，我们还输出对象类别。

items.en: The attribute clique graphs in Section 5.4 clearly show that learning attributes can help us identify types of objects. This experiment strengthens that insight. We learn that studying attributes together with objects can improve attribute prediction.
items.zh: 第5.4节中的属性团图清楚地表明，学习属性可以帮助我们识别对象类型。该实验强化了这一见解。我们了解到，将属性与对象一起学习可以提高属性预测。

items.en: While objects are the core building blocks of an image, relationships put them in context. These relationships help distinguish between images that contain the same objects but have different holistic interpretations. For example, an image of “a man riding a bike” and “a man falling off a bike” both contain man and bike, but the relationship (riding vs. falling_off) changes how we perceive both situations. Visual Genome is the largest known dataset of relationships, with a total of 1.81.81.8 million relationships and an average of 181818 relationships per image.
items.zh: 虽然对象是图像的核心构建块，但关系将它们置于上下文中。这些关系有助于区分包含相同对象但整体解释不同的图像。例如，“一个男人骑自行车”和“一个男人从自行车上摔下来”的图像都包含男人和自行车，但关系（骑 vs. 摔下）改变了我们对两种情况的感知。Visual Genome是已知最大的关系数据集，总共180万个关系，每张图像平均18个关系。

items.en: The setups of both experiments are similar to those of the experiments we performed on attributes. We again focus on the top 100100100 most frequent relationships. We lowercase, lemmatize, and strip excess whitespace from all relationships. We end up with around 34,0003400034,000 relationships and 27,0002700027,000 subject-relationship-object triples for training, validation, and testing. The input data to the experiment is the image region containing the union of the bounding boxes of the subject and object (essentially, the bounding box containing the two object boxes). We fine-tune a 16-layer VGG network Simonyan and Zisserman, (2014) with the same learning rates mentioned in Section 6.1.
items.zh: 两个实验的设置与我们对属性进行的实验类似。我们再次关注前100个最频繁的关系。我们将所有关系转换为小写、词形还原并去除多余空格。我们最终得到大约34,000个关系和27,000个主语-关系-宾语三元组用于训练、验证和测试。实验的输入数据是包含主语和宾语边界框并集的图像区域（本质上，包含两个对象框的边界框）。我们使用与第6.1节相同的学习率对16层VGG网络（Simonyan和Zisserman，2014）进行微调。

items.en: Overall, we find that relationships are not visually distinct enough for our discriminative model to learn effectively. Table 7 shows results for both experiments. For relationship classification, we converge after around 800800800 iterations with 8.74%percent8.748.74\% top-one accuracy and 29.69%percent29.6929.69\% top-five accuracy. Unlike attribute prediction, the accuracy results for relationships are much lower because of the high intra-class variability of most relationships. For the second experiment jointly predicting the relationship and its two object classes, we converge after around 450450450 iterations with 25.83%percent25.8325.83\% top-one accuracy and 65.57%percent65.5765.57\% top-five accuracy. We notice that object classification aids relationship prediction. Some relationships occur with some objects and never others; for example, the relationship drive only occurs with the object person and never with any other objects (dog, chair, etc.).
items.zh: 总体而言，我们发现关系在视觉上不够独特，我们的判别模型无法有效学习。表7显示了两个实验的结果。对于关系分类，我们在大约800次迭代后收敛，top-1准确率为8.74%，top-5准确率为29.69%。与属性预测不同，关系的准确率结果低得多，因为大多数关系具有较高的类内变异性。对于第二个实验，联合预测关系及其两个对象类别，我们在大约450次迭代后收敛，top-1准确率为25.83%，top-5准确率为65.57%。我们注意到对象分类有助于关系预测。某些关系只与某些对象一起出现，而从不与其他对象一起出现；例如，关系“驾驶”只与对象“人”一起出现，而从不与任何其他对象（狗、椅子等）一起出现。

items.capEn: Figure 37: Example predictions from the region description generation experiment. Regions in the first column (left) accurately describe the region, and those in the second column (right) are incorrect and unrelated to the corresponding region.
items.capZh: 图37：区域描述生成实验的示例预测。第一列（左）中的区域准确描述了该区域，第二列（右）中的区域不正确且与相应区域无关。

items.en: Generating sentence descriptions of images has gained popularity as a task in computer vision Kiros et al., (2014); Mao et al., (2014); Karpathy and Fei-Fei, (2014); Vinyals et al., (2014); however, current state-of-the-art models fail to describe all the different events captured in an image and instead provide only a high-level summary of the image. In this section, we test how well state-of-the-art models can caption the details of images. For both experiments, we use the NeuralTalk model Karpathy and Fei-Fei, (2014), since it not only provides state-of-the-art results but also is shown to be robust enough for predicting short descriptions. We train NeuralTalk on the Visual Genome dataset for region descriptions and on Flickr30K Young et al., (2014) for full sentence descriptions. As a model trained on other datasets would generate complete sentences and would not be comparable Chen et al., (2015) to our region descriptions, we convert all region descriptions generated by our model into complete sentences using predefined templates Hou et al., (2002).
items.zh: 生成图像的句子描述作为计算机视觉中的一项任务已获得广泛关注（Kiros 等，2014；Mao 等，2014；Karpathy 和 Fei-Fei，2014；Vinyals 等，2014）；然而，当前最先进的模型未能描述图像中捕获的所有不同事件，而仅提供图像的高级摘要。在本节中，我们测试最先进的模型在描述图像细节方面的表现。对于这两个实验，我们使用 NeuralTalk 模型（Karpathy 和 Fei-Fei，2014），因为它不仅提供了最先进的结果，而且被证明足够稳健，能够预测简短描述。我们在 Visual Genome 数据集上训练 NeuralTalk 用于区域描述，并在 Flickr30K（Young 等，2014）上训练用于完整句子描述。由于在其他数据集上训练的模型会生成完整句子，并且与我们的区域描述不可比（Chen 等，2015），我们使用预定义模板（Hou 等，2002）将模型生成的所有区域描述转换为完整句子。

items.en: For training, we begin by preprocessing region descriptions; we remove all non-alphanumeric characters and lowercase and strip excess whitespace from them. We have 4,158,84141588414,158,841 region descriptions in total. We end up with 3,150,00031500003,150,000 region descriptions for training – 504,420504420504,420 each for validation and testing. Note that we ensure descriptions of regions from the same image are exclusively in the training, validation, or testing set. We feed the bounding boxes of the regions through the pretrained VGG 16-layer network Simonyan and Zisserman, (2014) to get the 4096-dimensional feature vectors of each region. We then use the NeuralTalk Karpathy and Fei-Fei, (2014) model to train a long short-term memory (LSTM) network Hochreiter and Schmidhuber, (1997) to generate descriptions of regions. We use a learning rate of 0.0010.0010.001 trained with rmsprop Dauphin et al., (2015). The model converges after four days.
items.zh: 对于训练，我们首先预处理区域描述：移除所有非字母数字字符，转换为小写，并去除多余空格。我们总共有 4,158,841 条区域描述。最终得到 3,150,000 条区域描述用于训练——验证集和测试集各 504,420 条。注意，我们确保来自同一图像的区域描述完全属于训练集、验证集或测试集。我们将区域的边界框输入预训练的 VGG 16 层网络（Simonyan 和 Zisserman，2014），以获取每个区域的 4096 维特征向量。然后，我们使用 NeuralTalk（Karpathy 和 Fei-Fei，2014）模型训练长短期记忆（LSTM）网络（Hochreiter 和 Schmidhuber，1997）来生成区域描述。我们使用学习率 0.001，采用 rmsprop（Dauphin 等，2015）进行训练。模型在四天后收敛。

items.en: For testing, we crop the ground-truth region bounding boxes of images and extract their 4096-dimensional 16-layer VGG network Simonyan and Zisserman, (2014) features. We then feed these vectors through the pretrained NeuralTalk model to get predictions for region descriptions.
items.zh: 对于测试，我们裁剪图像的真实区域边界框，并提取其 4096 维的 16 层 VGG 网络（Simonyan 和 Zisserman，2014）特征。然后，我们将这些向量输入预训练的 NeuralTalk 模型，以获得区域描述的预测。

items.en: Visual Genome is currently the largest dataset of visual question answers with 1.71.71.7 million question and answer pairs. Each of our 108,249108249108,249 images contains an average of 171717 question answer pairs. Answering questions requires a deeper understanding of an image than generic image captioning. Question answering can involve fine-grained recognition (e.g. “What is the breed of the dog?”), object detection (e.g. “Where is the kite in the image?”), activity recognition (e.g. “What is this man doing?”), knowledge base reasoning (e.g. “Is this glass full?”), and common-sense reasoning (e.g. “What street will we be on if we turn right?”).
items.zh: Visual Genome 是目前最大的视觉问答数据集，包含 170 万个问答对。我们的 108,249 张图像每张平均有 17 个问答对。回答问题需要对图像有比通用图像描述更深入的理解。问答可能涉及细粒度识别（例如，“这只狗是什么品种？”）、目标检测（例如，“图像中的风筝在哪里？”）、活动识别（例如，“这个人在做什么？”）、知识库推理（例如，“这个杯子是满的吗？”）和常识推理（例如，“如果我们右转，我们会走在哪条街上？”）。

items.en: By leveraging the detailed annotations in the scene graphs in Visual Genome, we envision building smart models that can answer a myriad of visual questions. While we encourage the construction of smart models, in this paper, we provide some baseline metrics to help others compare their models.
items.zh: 通过利用 Visual Genome 场景图中的详细标注，我们设想构建能够回答大量视觉问题的智能模型。虽然我们鼓励构建智能模型，但在本文中，我们提供了一些基线指标，以帮助其他人比较他们的模型。

items.en: We split the QA pairs into a training set (60%percent6060\%) and a test set (40%percent4040\%). We ensure that all images are exclusive to either the training set or the test set. We implement a simple baseline model that relies on answer frequency. The model counts the top k𝑘k most frequent answers (similar to the ImageNet challenge Russakovsky et al., (2015)) in the training set as the predictions for all the test questions, where k=100𝑘100k=100, 500500500, and 100010001000. We let a model make k𝑘k different predictions. We say the model is correct on a QA if one of the k𝑘k predictions matches exactly with the ground-truth answer. We report the accuracy over all test questions. This evaluation method works well when the answers are short, especially for single-word answers. However, it causes problems when the answers are long phrases and sentences. Other evaluation methods require word ontologies Malinowski and Fritz, (2014), multiple choices Antol et al., (2015); Yu et al., (2015), or human judges Gao et al., (2015).
items.zh: 我们将问答对分为训练集（60%）和测试集（40%）。我们确保所有图像只属于训练集或测试集。我们实现了一个简单的基线模型，该模型依赖于答案频率。该模型统计训练集中最频繁的前 k 个答案（类似于 ImageNet 挑战赛（Russakovsky 等，2015）），并将其作为所有测试问题的预测，其中 k=100、500 和 1000。我们让模型做出 k 个不同的预测。如果 k 个预测中有一个与真实答案完全匹配，则称模型在该问答上正确。我们报告所有测试问题的准确率。当答案较短时，这种评估方法效果良好，尤其是对于单字答案。然而，当答案是长短语和句子时，它会导致问题。其他评估方法需要词本体（Malinowski 和 Fritz，2014）、多项选择（Antol 等，2015；Yu 等，2015）或人工评判（Gao 等，2015）。

items.en: We have analyzed the individual components of this dataset and presented experiments with baseline results for tasks such as attribute classification, relationship classification, description generation, and question answering. There are, however, more applications and experiments for which our dataset can be used. In this section, we note a few potential applications that our dataset can enable.
items.zh: 我们已经分析了该数据集的各个组成部分，并展示了属性分类、关系分类、描述生成和问答等任务的基线实验结果。然而，我们的数据集还可以用于更多应用和实验。在本节中，我们指出数据集可以启用的几个潜在应用。

items.en: We have seen numerous image captioning papers Kiros et al., (2014); Mao et al., (2014); Karpathy and Fei-Fei, (2014); Vinyals et al., (2014) that attempt to describe an entire image with a single caption. However, these captions do not exhaustively describe every part of the scene. An natural extension to this application, which the Visual Genome dataset enables, is the ability to create dense captioning models that describe parts of the scene.
items.zh: 我们已经看到许多图像描述论文（Kiros 等，2014；Mao 等，2014；Karpathy 和 Fei-Fei，2014；Vinyals 等，2014）试图用单个描述来概括整张图像。然而，这些描述并未详尽描述场景的每个部分。Visual Genome 数据集使这一应用的自然扩展成为可能，即创建描述场景部分的密集描述模型。

items.en: While visual question answering has been studied as a standalone task Yu et al., (2015); Ren et al., 2015a ; Antol et al., (2015); Gao et al., (2015), we introduce a dataset that combines all of our question answers with descriptions and scene graphs. Future work can build supervised models that utilize various components of Visual Genome to tackle question answering.
items.zh: 虽然视觉问答已被作为一个独立任务进行研究（Yu 等，2015；Ren 等，2015a；Antol 等，2015；Gao 等，2015），但我们引入了一个数据集，将所有问答与描述和场景图结合起来。未来的工作可以构建利用 Visual Genome 各种组件的监督模型来解决问答问题。

items.en: While we have seen a surge of image captioning Kiros et al., (2014) and question answering Antol et al., (2015) models, there has been little work on creating more comprehensive evaluation metrics to measure how well these models are performing. Such models are usually evaluated using BLEU, CIDEr, or METEOR and other similar metrics that do not effectively measure how well these models understand the image Chen et al., (2015). The Visual Genome scene graphs can be used as a measurement for image understanding. Generated descriptions and answers can be matched against the ground truth scene graph of an image to evaluate its corresponding model.
items.zh: 虽然我们已经看到图像描述（Kiros 等，2014）和问答（Antol 等，2015）模型的激增，但在创建更全面的评估指标来衡量这些模型的表现方面，工作还很少。这类模型通常使用 BLEU、CIDEr 或 METEOR 等指标进行评估，但这些指标并不能有效衡量模型对图像的理解程度（Chen 等，2015）。Visual Genome 场景图可以用作图像理解的度量。生成的描述和答案可以与图像的真实场景图进行匹配，以评估相应模型。

items.en: Relationship extraction has been extensively studied in information retrieval and natural language processing Zhou et al., (2007); GuoDong et al., (2005); Culotta and Sorensen, (2004); Socher et al., (2012). Visual Genome is the first large-scale visual relationship dataset. This dataset can be used to study the extraction of visual relationshipsSadeghi et al., (2015) from images, and its interactions between objects can also be used to study action recognition Yao and Fei-Fei, (2010); Ramanathan et al., (2015) and spatial orientation between objects Gupta et al., (2009); Prest et al., (2012).
items.zh: 关系提取已在信息检索和自然语言处理中得到广泛研究（Zhou 等，2007；GuoDong 等，2005；Culotta 和 Sorensen，2004；Socher 等，2012）。Visual Genome 是第一个大规模视觉关系数据集。该数据集可用于研究从图像中提取视觉关系（Sadeghi 等，2015），其对象之间的交互也可用于研究动作识别（Yao 和 Fei-Fei，2010；Ramanathan 等，2015）和对象之间的空间方向（Gupta 等，2009；Prest 等，2012）。

items.en: Previous work has already shown that scene graphs can be used to improve semantic image search Johnson et al., (2015); Schuster et al., (2015). Further methods can be explored using our region descriptions combined with region graphs. Attention-based search methods can also be explored where the area of interest specified by a query is also localized in the retrieved images.
items.zh: 先前的工作已经表明，场景图可用于改进语义图像搜索（Johnson 等，2015；Schuster 等，2015）。可以探索使用我们的区域描述与区域图相结合的其他方法。还可以探索基于注意力的搜索方法，其中查询指定的感兴趣区域也在检索到的图像中被定位。

items.en: Visual Genome provides a multi-layered understanding of pictures. It allows for a multi-perspective study of an image, from pixel-level information like objects, to relationships that require further inference, and to even deeper cognitive tasks like question answering. It is a comprehensive dataset for training and benchmarking the next generation of computer vision models. With Visual Genome, we expect these models to develop a broader understanding of our visual world, complementing computers’ capacities to detect objects with abilities to describe those objects and explain their interactions and relationships. Visual Genome is a large formalized knowledge representation for visual understanding and a more complete set of descriptions and question answers that grounds visual concepts to language.
items.zh: Visual Genome 提供了对图片的多层次理解。它允许从多个角度研究图像，从像素级信息（如对象），到需要进一步推理的关系，再到更深的认知任务（如问答）。它是训练和基准测试下一代计算机视觉模型的综合数据集。借助 Visual Genome，我们期望这些模型能够对我们的视觉世界有更广泛的理解，补充计算机检测对象的能力，并具备描述这些对象以及解释其交互和关系的能力。Visual Genome 是一个用于视觉理解的大型形式化知识表示，以及一套更完整的描述和问答，将视觉概念与语言联系起来。
